final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Minimal-cost VPC with ASG, ElastiCache Redis Replication Group supporting Multi-AZ failover and automated snapshots, with Lambda for dynamic snapshot retention control.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZs:
        - us-east-1a
        - us-east-1b
      AmiId: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-west-2:
      AZs:
        - us-west-2a
        - us-west-2b
      AmiId: ami-0a5c3558529278c43

Parameters:
  SnapshotRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 35
    Description: Number of days to retain automated snapshots (0 to disable)
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type for minimal cost
  CacheNodeType:
    Type: String
    Default: cache.m3.medium
    Description: ElastiCache node type for minimal cost
  DesiredCapacity:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Desired number of EC2 instances in ASG
  AdminCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR for SSH admin access (e.g., your bastion/VPN CIDR)

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !FindInMap
          - RegionMap
          - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
          - AZs
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !FindInMap
          - RegionMap
          - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
          - AZs
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances allowing SSH inbound and outbound to ElastiCache
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AdminCIDR
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 6379
          ToPort: 6379
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  ElastiCacheSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ElastiCache allowing inbound from EC2 SG only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 6379
          ToPort: 6379
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-elasticache-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lt"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap
          - RegionMap
          - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
          - AmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lt"
            - Key: Environment
              Value: production

  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-asg"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 3
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref DesiredCapacity
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-asg"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  CacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Subnet group for ElastiCache using public subnets
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-csg"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2

  ElastiCacheReplicationGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupId: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cache"
      ReplicationGroupDescription: Redis cluster with Multi-AZ failover and automated snapshots
      Engine: redis
      EngineVersion: 7.1
      CacheNodeType: !Ref CacheNodeType
      NumNodeGroups: 1
      ReplicasPerNodeGroup: 1
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref CacheSubnetGroup
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      AutomaticFailoverEnabled: true
      MultiAZEnabled: true
      SnapshotRetentionLimit: !Ref SnapshotRetentionDays
      SnapshotWindow: "03:00-04:00"
      AtRestEncryptionEnabled: true
      TransitEncryptionEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cache"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-elasticache-snapshot-policy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - elasticache:DescribeReplicationGroups
                  - elasticache:ModifyReplicationGroup
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:elasticache:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:replicationgroup:${ElastiCacheReplicationGroup}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-role"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  SnapshotLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-snapshot-lambda"
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              retention_days = event.get('retention_days', int(os.environ.get('DEFAULT_RETENTION', '1')))
              cluster_id = os.environ['CLUSTER_ID']
              client = boto3.client('elasticache')
              try:
                  response = client.modify_replication_group(
                      ReplicationGroupId=cluster_id,
                      SnapshotRetentionLimit=retention_days
                  )
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 200,
                      'body': json.dumps(f'Successfully updated snapshot retention to {retention_days} days for {cluster_id}')
                  }
              except Exception as e:
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 500,
                      'body': json.dumps(f'Error: {str(e)}')
                  }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          CLUSTER_ID: !Ref ElastiCacheReplicationGroup
          DEFAULT_RETENTION: !Ref SnapshotRetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-snapshot-lambda"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

Outputs:
  ASGName:
    Description: Name of the Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref AutoScalingGroup
  ElastiCachePrimaryEndpoint:
    Description: Primary endpoint address of the ElastiCache Redis Replication Group
    Value: !GetAtt ElastiCacheReplicationGroup.PrimaryEndPoint.Address
  LambdaFunctionArn:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for IoT data pipeline routing messages from AWS IoT Core topic device/data to SQS queue via SNS, with DLQ, error logging to CloudWatch Logs, and production-ready configurations.'

Parameters:
  QueueRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1209600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: 'Message retention period in seconds for main queue and DLQ (default 14 days).'
  VisibilityTimeoutInSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1200
    Description: 'Visibility timeout in seconds for the main SQS queue.'
  MaxReceiveCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: 'Maximum receive count before moving to DLQ.'

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for IoT SQS queues'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root account full access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService':
                  - !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SnsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for IoT SNS topic'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root account full access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService':
                  - !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub 'IoTDataDLQ-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref QueueRetentionPeriod
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub 'IoTDataQueue-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref QueueRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutInSeconds
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt IoTDataDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: !Ref MaxReceiveCount
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub 'IoTDataTopic-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsEncryptionKey
      DisplayName: !Sub 'IoTDataTopic-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref IoTDataTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt IoTDataQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      FilterPolicy: {}

  IoTRuleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'IoTRuleRole-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iot.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub 'IoTRulePolicy-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref IoTDataTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DeviceDataRule:
    Type: AWS::IoT::TopicRule
    Properties:
      RuleName: DeviceDataRule
      TopicRulePayload:
        Sql: "SELECT * FROM 'device/data'"
        Actions:
          - Sns:
              TargetArn: !Ref IoTDataTopic
              RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
        ErrorAction:
          CloudwatchLogs:
            LogGroupName: '/aws/iot/DeviceDataRuleErrors'
            RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  IoTDataQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the main SQS queue to store IoT messages'
    Value: !Ref IoTDataQueue
  IoTDataTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic acting as pub/sub intermediary'
    Value: !Ref IoTDataTopic
  DeviceDataRuleName:
    Description: 'Name of the IoT Topic Rule capturing device/data messages'
    Value: !Ref DeviceDataRule
  IoTDataSubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS Subscription linking topic to SQS queue'
    Value: !Ref IoTDataSubscription

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket integrated with Amazon EventBridge and SNS to notify subscribers about object creation events. The bucket sends Object Created events to EventBridge, which triggers an SNS topic.'

Resources:
  EventsKmsKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} KMS Key for S3 and SNS Encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 for SSE-KMS'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'kms:CallerAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS for encryption'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'kms:CallerAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: 'Allow EventBridge'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'events.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'events.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'kms:CallerAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

  EventsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-events-bucket'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EventsKmsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true

  EventsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref EventsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${EventsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount':
                  - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

  ObjectEventsTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-object-events-topic'
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} Object Events Topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EventsKmsKey

  S3ObjectCreatedRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Rule to capture S3 Object Created events and send to SNS'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - "Object Created"
        resources:
          - !GetAtt EventsBucket.Arn
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref EventsBucket
      Targets:
        - Id: NotifySNS
          Arn: !Ref ObjectEventsTopic
          InputPath: '$'

  ObjectEventsTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref ObjectEventsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref ObjectEventsTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt S3ObjectCreatedRule.Arn

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for event notifications'
    Value: !Ref EventsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  TopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic receiving object creation events'
    Value: !Ref ObjectEventsTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicArn'
  RuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule capturing S3 object created events'
    Value: !GetAtt S3ObjectCreatedRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RuleArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Real-time data pipeline with Kinesis Stream, Firehose, and S3"

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: "RealTimeDataStream"
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "realtime-data-lake"
  FirehoseBufferSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 128
  FirehoseBufferInterval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 900
  EnableCloudWatchLogging:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]

Conditions:
  EnableLogging: !Equals [!Ref EnableCloudWatchLogging, "true"]

Resources:
  BucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub "${AWS::StackName} S3 bucket encryption key"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Allow root access"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow S3 service"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "s3.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "kms:ViaService": !Sub "s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
              StringEquals:
                "kms:CallerAccount": !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                "kms:SourceArn": !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}/*"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "data-lake"

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "data-lake"

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource: !Sub "${Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false
          - Sid: AllowFirehosePutObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "firehose.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
            Resource: !Sub "${Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceAccount": !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                "aws:SourceArn": !Sub "arn:aws:firehose:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:deliverystream/${AWS::StackName}-Firehose"

  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: "aws/kinesis"

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub "firehose.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-FirehosePolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:kinesis:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stream/${StreamName}"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*"
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    "s3:x-amz-acl": "bucket-owner-full-control"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${Bucket}/*"
              - Fn::If:
                  - EnableLogging
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - logs:CreateLogGroup
                      - logs:CreateLogStream
                      - logs:PutLogEvents
                    Resource:
                      - !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/kinesis/${AWS::StackName}-Firehose"
                      - !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/kinesis/${AWS::StackName}-Firehose:*"
                  - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"

  FirehoseDeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Firehose"
      DeliveryStreamType: KinesisStreamAsSource
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        BucketARN: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref FirehoseBufferInterval
          SizeInMBs: !Ref FirehoseBufferSize
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        ErrorOutputPrefix: "errors/"
        Prefix: "year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/"
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Fn::If:
            - EnableLogging
            - Enabled: true
              LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/kinesis/${AWS::StackName}-Firehose"
              LogStreamName: "S3Delivery"
            - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream"
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream"
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryStream.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: "Name of the S3 Bucket"
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: "ARN of the S3 Bucket"
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure SSM Parameter Store and Secrets Manager for serverless config management

Parameters:
  StackPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: demo-serverless-config

Resources:
  ConfigParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackPrefix}/config/non-sensitive"
      Value: "This is A/B"
      Type: String
      Description: "Non-sensitive configuration value for serverless app"

  AppSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackPrefix}-app-secret"
      Description: "Secure credentials for serverless application"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "adminuser", "password": "<password>"}'
        PasswordLength: 20
        ExcludeCharacters: "!@#$%^&*()+=[]{}|;:,.<>?/"
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ServerlessConfigDemo
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              'StringEquals':
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
              'Null':
                'sts:ExternalId': 'false'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:DescribeParameters
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter//${StackPrefix}/config/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                  - secretsmanager:DescribeSecret
                Resource: !Ref AppSecret
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/*:*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ServerlessConfigDemo
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  RetrievalLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import logging

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              try:
                  stack_prefix = os.environ.get('StackPrefix', 'demo-serverless-config')
                  ssm = boto3.client('ssm')
                  params = ssm.get_parameters_by_path(
                      Path=f'/{stack_prefix}/config/',
                      Recursive=True,
                      WithDecryption=False
                  )
                  logger.info(f"Retrieved {len(params.get('Parameters', []))} SSM parameters")

                  sm = boto3.client('secretsmanager')
                  secret = sm.get_secret_value(SecretId=os.environ['AppSecretArn'])
                  secret_value = json.loads(secret['SecretString'])
                  logger.info(f"Retrieved secret for user {secret_value['username']}")

                  return {
                      'statusCode': 200,
                      'body': json.dumps('Parameters and secret retrieved successfully')
                  }
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Error: {str(e)}")
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 500,
                      'body': json.dumps(f'Error: {str(e)}')
                  }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          StackPrefix: !Ref StackPrefix
          AppSecretArn: !Ref AppSecret
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ServerlessConfigDemo
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

Outputs:
  SSMParameterArn:
    Description: ARN of the SSM Parameter
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter//${StackPrefix}/config/non-sensitive"
  SecretsManagerSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager Secret
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AppSecret}"
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt RetrievalLambda.Arn
  LambdaInvokeArn:
    Description: Invoke ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt RetrievalLambda.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ EFS shared storage with EC2 instances across AZs, performance monitoring via CloudWatch alarms, and automated EFS mounting using SSM-enabled IAM roles.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0d1bcd5fbcdffaaad
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0fe74959c1c9dcf9e
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0b3c9d40cb2ff6c5b
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0b1f59a1ba39d5e36

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 172.31.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 172.31.0.0/20
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 172.31.32.0/20
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  NetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  NACLInboundNFS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 2049
        To: 2049
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundEphemeralTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 400
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundEphemeralUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 410
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

  NACLOutboundEphemeralTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  NACLOutboundEphemeralUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  NACLOutboundNFS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 2049
        To: 2049
      Egress: true

  NACLDenyInboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 32766
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false

  NACLDenyOutboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 32767
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true

  NACLAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1

  NACLAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2

  EFS:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting

  EFSClientSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS clients allowing NFS outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
      - IpProtocol: tcp
        FromPort: 2049
        ToPort: 2049
        CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock

  MountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount targets allowing NFS inbound from clients
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
      - IpProtocol: tcp
        FromPort: 2049
        ToPort: 2049
        SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup

  MountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFS
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      SecurityGroups:
      - !Ref MountTargetSecurityGroup

  MountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFS
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
      - !Ref MountTargetSecurityGroup

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
          Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
      - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
      - PolicyName: EFSMountAccess
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: '2012-10-17'
          Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
            - elasticfilesystem:ClientMount
            - elasticfilesystem:ClientRootAccess
            - elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite
            - elasticfilesystem:DescribeMountTargets
            - ec2:DescribeAvailabilityZones
            Resource: '*'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
      - !Ref EC2Role

  EC2InstanceA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn:
    - MountTarget1
    - VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
      - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
        Ebs:
          VolumeType: gp3
          VolumeSize: 8
          Encrypted: true
          DeleteOnTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpTokens: required
      NetworkInterfaces:
      - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        DeviceIndex: 0
        GroupSet:
        - !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
        SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -x
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-efs-utils nfs-utils aws-cfn-bootstrap
          efsdns=${EFS}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com
          attempt=1
          while [ $attempt -le 60 ]; do
            if timeout 5 bash -c 'echo > /dev/tcp/${efsdns}/2049' 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "EFS mount target available"
              break
            fi
            echo "Waiting for EFS... attempt $attempt"
            sleep 10
            attempt=$((attempt + 1))
          done
          mkdir -p /home
          mount -t efs -o tls,iam,_netdev ${efsdns}:/ /home
          if mountpoint -q /home && touch /home/test && df -h | grep -q EFS; then
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2InstanceA --region ${AWS::Region}
          else
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2InstanceA --region ${AWS::Region}
          fi

  EC2InstanceB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn:
    - MountTarget2
    - VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
      - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
        Ebs:
          VolumeType: gp3
          VolumeSize: 8
          Encrypted: true
          DeleteOnTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpTokens: required
      NetworkInterfaces:
      - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        DeviceIndex: 0
        GroupSet:
        - !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
        SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -x
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-efs-utils nfs-utils aws-cfn-bootstrap
          efsdns=${EFS}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com
          attempt=1
          while [ $attempt -le 60 ]; do
            if timeout 5 bash -c 'echo > /dev/tcp/${efsdns}/2049' 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "EFS mount target available"
              break
            fi
            echo "Waiting for EFS... attempt $attempt"
            sleep 10
            attempt=$((attempt + 1))
          done
          mkdir -p /home
          mount -t efs -o tls,iam,_netdev ${efsdns}:/ /home
          if mountpoint -q /home && touch /home/test && df -h | grep -q EFS; then
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2InstanceB --region ${AWS::Region}
          else
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2InstanceB --region ${AWS::Region}
          fi

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns

  PercentIOLimitTooHigh:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${EFS}-PercentIOLimitTooHigh
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when EFS Percent I/O limit exceeds 95%
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Dimensions:
      - Name: FileSystemId
        Value: !Ref EFS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      Threshold: 95
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
      - !Ref SNSTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  PermittedThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${EFS}-PermittedThroughputUtilizationTooHigh
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when EFS throughput utilization exceeds 80%
      Metrics:
      - Id: read
        MetricStat:
          Metric:
            Namespace: AWS/EFS
            MetricName: DataReadBytes
            Dimensions:
            - Name: FileSystemId
              Value: !Ref EFS
          Period: 300
          Stat: Sum
        ReturnData: false
      - Id: write
        MetricStat:
          Metric:
            Namespace: AWS/EFS
            MetricName: DataWriteBytes
            Dimensions:
            - Name: FileSystemId
              Value: !Ref EFS
          Period: 300
          Stat: Sum
        ReturnData: false
      - Id: thru
        MetricStat:
          Metric:
            Namespace: AWS/EFS
            MetricName: PermittedThroughput
            Dimensions:
            - Name: FileSystemId
              Value: !Ref EFS
          Period: 300
          Stat: Average
        ReturnData: false
      - Id: util
        Expression: '((read.Sum / 300 + write.Sum / 300) / thru.Average) * 100'
        Label: Throughput Utilization (%)
        ReturnData: true
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Threshold: 80
      EvaluationPeriods: 6
      AlarmActions:
      - !Ref SNSTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemDNS:
    Description: DNS name of the EFS file system
    Value: !Sub ${EFS}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com

  MountTarget1ARN:
    Description: ARN of Mount Target 1
    Value: !Ref MountTarget1

  MountTarget2ARN:
    Description: ARN of Mount Target 2
    Value: !Ref MountTarget2

  EC2InstanceAID:
    Description: ID of EC2InstanceA. Connect via SSM Session Manager (no SSH keys needed)
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceA

  EC2InstanceBID:
    Description: ID of EC2InstanceB. Connect via SSM Session Manager (no SSH keys needed)
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceB

  PercentIOLimitAlarmARN:
    Description: ARN of the Percent I/O Limit alarm
    Value: !Ref PercentIOLimitTooHigh

  PermittedThroughputAlarmARN:
    Description: ARN of the Permitted Throughput utilization alarm
    Value: !Ref PermittedThroughputAlarm

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Sample CloudFormation template deploying a basic Lambda function.'

Resources:
  SampleLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: SampleLambdaExecutionRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  SampleLambdaFunction:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: SampleLambdaFunction
      Role: !GetAtt SampleLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  "statusCode": 200,
                  "body": "Hello from Lambda!"
              }
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      Environment:
        Variables:
          SAMPLE_ENV: production
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: Sample
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: 'Name of the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref SampleLambdaFunction
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn
  LambdaInvokeArn:
    Description: 'Invoke ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an isolated MySQL RDS instance (db.r5.large with io1 storage) in a dedicated VPC with private subnets for high availability readiness.

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
  DBInstanceIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: mysql-test-instance
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydb
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
  Iops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1000

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'
  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  MySQLDBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Private subnets for MySQL RDS high availability
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLDBSubnetGroup'
  MySQLRDSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: MySQL RDS Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLRDSecurityGroup'
  MySQLRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Ref DBInstanceIdentifier
      DBInstanceClass: db.r6i.large
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret: {}
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref MySQLDBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref MySQLRDSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      MultiAZ: false

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: MySQL RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLRDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RDSecurityGroupId:
    Description: MySQL RDS Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref MySQLRDSecurityGroup

Description: 'CloudFormation template for MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with automated snapshots and basic public VPC networking infrastructure across two AZs.'

    Type: String

  PublicSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24

    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydb
    Description: DB name
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    Description: DB admin user
  MasterUserPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    MinLength: 8
    MaxLength: 41
    AllowedPattern: '^[

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a secure, isolated MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with VPC isolation and Secrets Manager integration.'

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydb
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 35
  PreferredMaintenanceWindow:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Sun:23:00-Sun:23:30'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'

  VPCPrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref VPCPrivateRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref VPCPrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Private subnets for RDS
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: RDS MySQL access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'

  KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for RDS encryption and Secrets Manager
      KeyPolicy:
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow RDS use
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: !Sub '${KmsKey.Arn}'
          - Sid: Allow Secrets Manager use
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: secretsmanager.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: !Sub '${KmsKey.Arn}'

  KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-rds-mysql-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KmsKey

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Family: mysql8.0
      Description: Custom MySQL 8.0 params

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DependsOn: [VPC, DBSubnetGroup]
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql'
      InstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      MasterUserSecret:
        KmsKeyId: !Ref KmsKey
        SecretName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql-secret'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref KmsKey
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: !Ref PreferredMaintenanceWindow
      DeletionProtection: true
      MultiAZ: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  SecretArn:
    Description: Secrets Manager Secret ARN for DB credentials
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.MasterUserSecret.SecretArn
  KmsKeyArn:
    Description: KMS Key ARN
    Value: !Ref KmsKey
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure S3 buckets with encryption, logging, and HTTPS enforcement for security scanning compliance'

Resources:
  ReplicasBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 to use KMS key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn':
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-key'
        - Key: Security
          Value: Compliant

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs'
        - Key: Security
          Value: Compliant

  ReplicasBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ReplicasBucketKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
        LogFilePrefix: logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas'
        - Key: Security
          Value: Compliant

  ReplicasBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicasBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: RequireSecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicasBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicasBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogging
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}/logs/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicasBucket}'
          - Sid: RequireSecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  ReplicasBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Replicas S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicasBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ReplicasBucketName'

  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Access Logs S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessLogsBucketName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for S3 bucket triggering a Lambda function'

Parameters:
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: nodejs20.x
    AllowedValues:
      - nodejs20.x
      - python3.12
    Description: 'Lambda runtime'

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service to use key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow Lambda to decrypt'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  TriggerBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-trigger-bucket-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: 's3:ObjectCreated:*'
            Function: !GetAtt TriggerLambda.Arn
            Filter:
              S3Key:
                Rules:
                  - Name: suffix
                    Value: .json

  TriggerBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref TriggerBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${TriggerBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${TriggerBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'lambda-execution-role-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'

  LambdaS3AccessPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub 'lambda-s3-access-policy-${AWS::StackName}'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${TriggerBucket}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${TriggerBucket}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole

  TriggerLambda:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 's3-trigger-lambda-${AWS::StackName}'
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('Received S3 event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: 'OK'
            };
          };
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Permission'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref TriggerLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${TriggerBucket}'
      SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref TriggerBucket
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt TriggerLambda.Arn
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: 'Name of the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref TriggerLambda

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for an SQS FIFO queue providing ordered, deduplicated messaging with high throughput, extended retention, security best practices, and transport encryption enforcement."

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: "MyAppQueue.fifo"
    AllowedPattern: ".*\\.fifo$"
    ConstraintDescription: "Queue name must end with '.fifo' for FIFO queues."
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 80
    Description: "Name of the FIFO queue (must end with .fifo)."
  KmsMasterKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: "alias/aws/sqs"
    Description: "KMS master key ID for customer-managed encryption (optional)."

Resources:
  FifoQueue:
    Type: "AWS::SQS::Queue"
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: false
      DeduplicationScope: "queue"
      FifoThroughputLimit: "perQueue"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 900
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Ref QueueName
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: "Production"

  SecureQueuePolicy:
    Type: "AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy"
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref FifoQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "deny-insecure-transport"
            Effect: "Deny"
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action: "sqs:*"
            Resource: !GetAtt FifoQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false
          - Sid: "allow-sqs-actions"
            Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action:
              - "sqs:SendMessage"
              - "sqs:ReceiveMessage"
              - "sqs:DeleteMessage"
              - "sqs:GetQueueAttributes"
            Resource: !GetAtt FifoQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: "URL of the SQS FIFO Queue"
    Value: !Ref FifoQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${QueueName}-URL"
  QueueArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SQS FIFO Queue"
    Value: !GetAtt FifoQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${QueueName}-ARN"

Description: Deploys a secure, encrypted SQS Standard Queue for decoupled application messaging.

Resources:

    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for SQS StandardQueue encryption"
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Allow root full access"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: "Allow SQS service"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-KMSKey"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  StandardQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-StandardQueue-${AWS::Region}"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref StandardQueueKey
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  StandardQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref StandardQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountRoot
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'

              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public subnets across two Availability Zones and one private subnet using static AZ mapping for persistence across regions.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      AZ1: us-east-2a
      AZ2: us-east-2b
    us-west-1:
      AZ1: us-west-1a
      AZ2: us-west-1b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b
    ap-southeast-2:
      AZ1: ap-southeast-2a
      AZ2: ap-southeast-2b
    ap-northeast-1:
      AZ1: ap-northeast-1a
      AZ2: ap-northeast-1c

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RoutePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:

    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:

    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:

    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateSubnetId:

    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetId'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: ID of the Public Route Table

      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Description: ID of the Private Route Table

    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a secure S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption, lifecycle management, bucket policy enforcement, versioning, public access blocks, and organizational tags.'

Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key used for encrypting objects in the S3 bucket'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'DefaultRoot'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'AllowS3Service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: 'alias/my-s3-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-bucket'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 'MoveToIAAfter30ExpireAfter365'
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'ForceSSL'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
              - !Sub '${Bucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: 'DenyUnencryptedObjects'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: 'DenyWrongKMSKey'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject*'
            Resource: !Sub '${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'kms:KeyId': !Ref KMSKey

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: 'ID of the KMS key'
    Value: !Ref KMSKey
  AliasArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key alias'
    Value: !Ref KeyAlias
