AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection enabled.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Secure outbound only Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 128.0.0.0/1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'

  MyKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for S3 encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'

  MyBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-mybucket'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref MyKMSKey

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MyBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecure
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${MyBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  MyDynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-table'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: PK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: SK
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: PK
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: SK
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name
    Value: !Ref MyBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  TableName:
    Description: DynamoDB Table Name
    Value: !Ref MyDynamoDBTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TableName'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-e43c6b61' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-e43c6b61: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MyKMSKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MyKMSKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'MyBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MyBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'MyDynamoDBTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MyDynamoDBTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-e43c6b61: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']
deploy_completed_resources: MyKMSKey | MyBucket | BucketPolicy | MyDynamoDBTable | VPC | SecurityGroup | iac-god-eval-e43c6b61

Did you mean 'KMSMasterKeyID'?) | [E3002] {'ColumnNumber': 9, 'LineNumber': 100}: Additional properties are not allowed ('KMSMasterKeyID' was unexpected. Did you mean 'KMSMasterKeyId'?)

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public and two private subnets across different AZs, route tables, and routes to the Internet Gateway for public subnets.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1Id'

  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2Id'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Description: Private Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableId'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-3902fb9c' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-3902fb9c: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PrivateRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PrivateRouteTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet1: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet1: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet2: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet2: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicRoute: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicRoute: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-3902fb9c: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Secure, web-based VS Code development environment on EC2 Ubuntu 22.04 with code-server (port 8080, no auth),
  restricted to CloudFront regional IPs via Security Group, global HTTPS/caching via CloudFront (1y TTL policy).
  SSM-managed, demo-focused (open HTTP origin, no TLS enforce); production requires hardening (auth, TLS, etc.).
Parameters:
  CodeServerVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: 4.22.1
    Description: code-server version to install
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type
  KeyName:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName'
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (SSM preferred)
  CloudFrontCIDRs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: >-
      CloudFront regional IP CIDRs from https://ip-ranges.amazonaws.com/ip-ranges.json
      (filter "service": "CLOUDFRONT", "region": "*" excluding global).
      Update this comma-separated list for full coverage.
    Default: 13.32.0.0/15,52.84.0.0/15,54.192.0.0/13,13.35.0.0/16,18.64.0.0/14,199.27.72.0/21,13.249.0.0/16
Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]
Mappings:
  AWSRegionToAMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-08c153a2a1e5258e6
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a2bdc918a8a517bb
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0fa8b2d288f0e5e49
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0eb89db7593b5d434
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0d2c71dd07bf5818d
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  CodeServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow CloudFront to EC2 code-server on 8080
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [0, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 0 to code-server 8080
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [1, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 1 to code-server 8080
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [2, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 2 to code-server 8080
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [3, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 3 to code-server 8080
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [4, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 4 to code-server 8080
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [5, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 5 to code-server 8080
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [6, !Ref CloudFrontCIDRs]
          Description: CloudFront regional IP 6 to code-server 8080
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CodeServerSG'
  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole
  CodeServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT30M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [AWSRegionToAMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref CodeServerSecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 30
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -ex
          apt-get update -y
          apt-get upgrade -y
          apt-get install -y curl wget snapd unzip python3-pip apt-transport-https software-properties-common
          snap install amazon-ssm-agent --classic
          systemctl enable --now amazon-ssm-agent
          curl -fsSL https://code-server.dev/install.sh | sh -s -- --version ${CodeServerVersion}
          mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/code-server.service.d
          cat > /etc/systemd/system/code-server.service.d/override.conf << 'EOF'
          [Service]
          ExecStart=
          ExecStart=/usr/lib/code-server/bin/code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth none
          EOF
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable code-server
          systemctl start code-server
          pip3 install aws-cfn-bootstrap-py3
          COUNT=0
          while [ $COUNT -lt 180 ]; do
            if curl -f http://localhost:8080/healthz >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource CodeServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
              exit 0
            fi
            sleep 10
            COUNT=$((COUNT+1))
          done
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource CodeServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CodeServer'
  CodeServerWebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebACL'
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
      Rules:
        - Name: CommonRules
          Priority: 0
          Statement:
            ManagedRuleGroupStatement:
              VendorName: AWS
              Name: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
          OverrideAction:
            None: {}
          VisibilityConfig:
            SampledRequestsEnabled: true
            CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
            MetricName: CommonRules
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebACL'
  CodeServerDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Comment: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} code-server demo'
        Enabled: true
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: CodeServerOrigin
          CachePolicyId: Managed-CachingOptimized
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        WebACLId: !Ref CodeServerWebACL
        Origins:
          - Id: CodeServerOrigin
            DomainName: !GetAtt CodeServerInstance.PublicDnsName
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPPort: 8080
              HTTPSPort: 443
              OriginProtocolPolicy: http-only
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CloudFront'
Outputs:
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: CloudFront URL for secure HTTPS access to code-server
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CodeServerDistribution.DomainName}'
  InstanceEndpoint:
    Description: Direct endpoint (same as CloudFrontURL)
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CodeServerDistribution.DomainName}'
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref CodeServerInstance
  PublicIP:
    Description: EC2 Public IP
    Value: !GetAtt CodeServerInstance.PublicIp
  AZ:
    Description: Instance Availability Zone
    Value: !GetAtt CodeServerInstance.AvailabilityZone
  SSMConnectInstructions:
    Description: >-
      Connect via SSM Session Manager (no SSH key needed):
      aws ssm start-session --target INSTANCE-ID --region REGION
    Value: !Sub 'aws ssm start-session --target ${CodeServerInstance} --region ${AWS::Region}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECS Cluster with Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers for hybrid capacity provisioning.'

Resources:
  MyECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: MyECSCluster
      CapacityProviders:
        - FARGATE
        - FARGATE_SPOT
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE_SPOT
          Weight: 1
          Base: 30
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE
          Weight: 1
      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
          Value: enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyECSCluster
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: The name of the ECS cluster
    Value: !Ref MyECSCluster
  ClusterArn:
    Description: The ARN of the ECS cluster
    Value: !GetAtt MyECSCluster.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECS Fargate NGINX Task Definition with IAM Roles for SSM Session Management and CloudWatch Logging'

Parameters:
  CpuArchitecture:
    Type: String
    Default: X86_64
    AllowedValues:
      - X86_64
      - ARM64
    Description: 'CPU architecture for the Fargate task (X86_64 or ARM64)'

Resources:
  ECSTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskExecutionRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy

  ECSTaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMExecuteCommandPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'

  NginxLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: '/ecs/nginx-tasks'
      RetentionInDays: 7

  NGINXTaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: nginx-fargate-task
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      Cpu: '256'
      Memory: '512'
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSTaskExecutionRole.Arn
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSTaskRole.Arn
      RuntimePlatform:
        CpuArchitecture: !Ref CpuArchitecture
        OperatingSystemFamily: LINUX
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx
          Image: nginx:latest
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref NginxLogGroup
              awslogs-region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
              awslogs-stream-prefix: ecs
              awslogs-create-group: 'false'

Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the NGINX ECS Task Definition'
    Value: !GetAtt NGINXTaskDefinition.TaskDefinitionArn
  TaskRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ECS Task Role with SSM permissions'
    Value: !GetAtt ECSTaskRole.Arn
  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ECS Task Execution Role for ECR and logging'
    Value: !GetAtt ECSTaskExecutionRole.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the CloudWatch Logs Log Group for container logs'
    Value: !Ref NginxLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to provision a Windows Server 2019 EC2 instance for CPU stress testing using SSM Run Command. Includes IAM roles for EC2/SSM integration and FIS, custom SSM document for CPU stress simulation, and parameterized configurations.'

Parameters:
  AMISSMParam:
    Type: String
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base'
    Description: 'SSM parameter for latest Windows Server 2019 AMI'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 't3.micro'
    AllowedValues:
      - 't3.nano'
      - 't3.micro'
      - 't3.small'
      - 't3.medium'
      - 't3.large'
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'
  SubnetId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Subnet ID (optional). If not provided, uses default VPC subnet.'
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Default: ''
    Description: 'VPC ID (optional; provide matching VPC for custom SubnetId or non-default fallback).'
  KeyName:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName'
    Default: ''
    Description: 'EC2 KeyPair for RDP/SSH access (optional).'

Conditions:
  KeyNameProvided: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref KeyName, '' ] ]
  SubnetProvided: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref SubnetId, '' ] ]
  VpcIdProvided: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref VpcId, '' ] ]

Resources:
  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Path: '/'

  EC2SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  CPUStressTestDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: 'Simulates CPU stress by spawning threads equal to logical processors for configurable duration.'
        parameters:
          DurationInMinutes:
            type: Integer
            default: 5
            description: '(Optional) Duration in minutes'
            minValue: 1
            maxValue: 60
        mainSteps:
          - name: stressCPU
            action: aws:runPowerShellScript
            precondition:
              StringEquals:
                - key: platformType
                  value: Windows
            inputs:
              runCommand: |
                try {
                  $DurationInMinutes = {{ DurationInMinutes }}
                  $numCores = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).NumberOfLogicalProcessors
                  Write-Output "Detected $numCores logical processors. Starting stress test for $DurationInMinutes minutes."
                  $jobs = @()
                  1..$numCores | ForEach-Object {
                    $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock {
                      while ($true) {
                        $sum = 0
                        1..10000000 | ForEach-Object { $sum += $_ * 1.00001 }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                  Start-Sleep -Seconds ($DurationInMinutes * 60)
                  $jobs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Job $_ -Force; Receive-Job $_ -Keep }
                  Write-Output "CPU stress test completed."
                }
                catch {
                  Write-Error "Failed: $_"
                  exit 1
                }

  SSMOutboundSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Outbound access to SSM service endpoints only'
      VpcId: !If [VpcIdProvided, !Ref VpcId, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          DestinationPrefixListId: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm'
          Description: 'SSM endpoint access'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          DestinationPrefixListId: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages'
          Description: 'SSM Messages endpoint access'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          DestinationPrefixListId: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages'
          Description: 'EC2 Messages endpoint access'

  WindowsStressTestInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId:
        Fn::Transform:
          Name: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
          Parameters:
            ParameterName: !Ref AMISSMParam
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [KeyNameProvided, !Ref KeyName, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !If [SubnetProvided, !Ref SubnetId, !Select [0, !GetAZSubnets !If [VpcIdProvided, !Ref VpcId, ''] ] ]
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SSMOutboundSG
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          <powershell>
          Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope LocalMachine -Force
          Restart-Service AmazonSSMAgent -Force
          </powershell>
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 30
            Encrypted: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'WindowsCPUStressTest-${AWS::StackName}'

  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'FISCPStressRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

  FISInlinePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FISCPStressPolicy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref FISRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: SSMDocumentCommand
            Effect: Allow
            Action: ssm:SendCommand
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/${CPUStressTestDocument}'
          - Sid: SSMInstanceCommand
            Effect: Allow
            Action: ssm:SendCommand
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/${WindowsStressTestInstance}'
          - Sid: CloudWatchLogs
            Effect: Allow
            Action: ["logs:CreateLogGroup","logs:CreateLogStream","logs:PutLogEvents","logs:DescribeLogGroups","logs:DescribeLogStreams"]
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/ssm/*'
          - Sid: EC2Describe
            Effect: Allow
            Action: ec2:DescribeInstances
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: EC2Control
            Effect: Allow
            Action: ["ec2:StartInstances","ec2:StopInstances","ec2:RebootInstances"]
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/${WindowsStressTestInstance}'
          - Sid: Metrics
            Effect: Allow
            Action: cloudwatch:PutMetricData
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: FISManagement
            Effect: Allow
            Action: ["fis:CreateExperimentTemplate","fis:GetExperimentTemplate"]
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID'
    Value: !Ref WindowsStressTestInstance
  InstancePublicDnsName:
    Description: 'Public DNS Name of the instance (if in public subnet)'
    Value: !GetAtt WindowsStressTestInstance.PublicDnsName
  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: 'Name of the custom SSM document'
    Value: !Ref CPUStressTestDocument
  FISRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the FIS IAM Role'
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template creating tiered IAM roles for AWS FIS access controls. SecurityAdmin: full FIS access including SLR creation; Admin: full FIS except prod-tagged; User: limited FIS actions except prod; NonUser: read-only AWS access with FIS deny and conditional PassRole.'

Parameters:
  WorkshopRoleArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: arn:aws:iam::*:role/*
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of full IAM role ARNs (e.g., "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/WorkshopRole1,arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/WorkshopRole2") that can be passed to FIS.'
  ProdTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: 'Tag value for Environment that triggers prod denies (default: prod).'

Resources:
  FISSecurityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: FSPassRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Ref WorkshopRoleArns
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
        - PolicyName: FISServiceLinkedRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'iam:AWSServiceName': fis.amazonaws.com
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:AttachRolePolicy
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
      Path: /
      RoleName: FISSecurityAdminRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecurityAdmin

  FISAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISAdminAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'fis:ResourceTag/Environment': !Ref ProdTagValue
        - PolicyName: FSPassRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Ref WorkshopRoleArns
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
      Path: /
      RoleName: FISAdminRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Admin

  FISUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISUserAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:GetExperiment*
                  - fis:List*
                  - fis:StartExperiment
                  - fis:StopExperiment
                  - fis:TagResource
                  - fis:UntagResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'fis:ResourceTag/Environment': !Ref ProdTagValue
        - PolicyName: FSPassRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Ref WorkshopRoleArns
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/aws-service-role/fis.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonFIS*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
      Path: /
      RoleName: FISUserRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: User

  FISNonUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISDenyAll
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
      Path: /
      RoleName: FISNonUserRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: NonUser

Outputs:
  FISSecurityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for FIS Security Admin role with full FIS access, SLR management, and role passing.'
    Value: !GetAtt FISSecurityAdminRole.Arn
  FISAdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for FIS Admin role with full FIS access except prod-tagged resources.'
    Value: !GetAtt FISAdminRole.Arn
  FISUserRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for FIS User role with limited experiment actions except prod-tagged resources.'
    Value: !GetAtt FISUserRole.Arn
  FISNonUserRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for FIS Non-User role with read-only AWS access and full FIS deny.'
    Value: !GetAtt FISNonUserRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Environment-specific DynamoDB tables for supporter product data'

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['PROD', 'CODE']
    Default: 'CODE'
    Description: 'Deployment environment (PROD or CODE)'

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, 'PROD']

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub 'SupporterProductData-${Stage}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: 'SupporterId'
          AttributeType: 'S'
        - AttributeName: 'ProductId'
          AttributeType: 'S'
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: 'SupporterId'
          KeyType: 'HASH'
        - AttributeName: 'ProductId'
          KeyType: 'RANGE'
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, 'PROVISIONED', 'PAY_PER_REQUEST']
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: 'expiryDate'
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub 'SupporterProductData-${Stage}'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: 'Backup'
          Value: 'true'

  WriteScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub 'table/${SupporterProductDataTable}'
      ServiceNamespace: 'dynamodb'
      ScalableDimension: 'dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits'

  WriteScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      PolicyName: 'WriteTargetTracking'
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref WriteScalableTarget
      PolicyType: 'TargetTrackingScaling'
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: 'DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization'
        TargetValue: 70.0
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60
        ScaleInCooldown: 60

Outputs:
  SupporterProductDataTableName:
    Description: 'Name of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table'
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  SupporterProductDataTableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table'
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Creates three IAM managed policies: S3AccessPolicy for read/write access to ios-apps.sagebridge.org bucket for iOS application, DynamoDBProtectionPolicy denying deletion and schema-modification actions, and RDSProtectionPolicy blocking destructive RDS operations."

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: "Grants read/write access to S3 bucket ios-apps.sagebridge.org for iOS application"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: "arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org"
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: "arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*"

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: "Denies deletion and schema-modification actions on DynamoDB to prevent accidental data loss"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: "*"

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: "Denies destructive operations on RDS to safeguard databases and backups"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: "ARN of the S3 Access Policy"
    Value: !Ref S3AccessPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicyArn"

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: "ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy"
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn"

  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: "ARN of the RDS Protection Policy"
    Value: !Ref RDSProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicyArn"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM role for Bedrock Agent execution, assumable only by the Bedrock service in the same account, with permissions scoped to Bedrock agent resources, foundation model invocation, and Lambda function triggering.'

Resources:
  BedrockAgentExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: BedrockAgentExecutionRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount:
                  !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockInvokeModelPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource:
                  !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-model/*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:*
                Resource:
                  !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BedrockAgentExecutionRole
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Bedrock Agent Execution Role

Outputs:
  BedrockAgentExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Bedrock Agent Execution Role'
    Value:
      !GetAtt BedrockAgentExecutionRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Template for creating an S3 bucket for ALB access logs compliant with AWS logging requirements.

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-access-logs-bucket"
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireLogsAfter90Days
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALB Access Logs
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ALBLogDeliveryWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*"
          - Sid: ALBLogDeliveryAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}"
          - Sid: ALBLogDeliveryPolicy
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: s3:PutBucketPolicy
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub "arn:aws:elasticloadbalancing:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:loadbalancer/*"
          - Sid: S3LogDeliveryWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*"
          - Sid: S3LogDeliveryAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ALBAccessLogsBucket}"

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the ALB access logs bucket for ALB logging configuration
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >-
  Deploys an AWS Macie V2 Session to enable automated sensitive data discovery and security monitoring of S3 buckets across multiple AWS accounts.
  Deploy ONLY in the AWS Organizations delegated administrator account for Macie.
  Prerequisites: Enable Macie delegated admin via AWS Organizations, ensure member accounts have necessary permissions.
  The macie.amazonaws.com service-linked role is auto-created upon first Session ENABLED.
  Supports up to 5 member accounts via parameters MemberAccountId01 to MemberAccountId05.

Parameters:
  MemberAccountId01:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional AWS account ID for Macie member 1 (e.g., 111122223333). Leave empty if not used.
  MemberAccountId02:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional AWS account ID for Macie member 2 (e.g., 444455556666). Leave empty if not used.
  MemberAccountId03:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional AWS account ID for Macie member 3. Leave empty if not used.
  MemberAccountId04:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional AWS account ID for Macie member 4. Leave empty if not used.
  MemberAccountId05:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional AWS account ID for Macie member 5. Leave empty if not used.
  MacieFindingsBucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: macie-findings
    Description: Prefix for the S3 findings bucket name. Full name will be Prefix-Region-AccountId (must be globally unique).
  KmsKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Default: "alias/aws/s3"
    Description: Optional ARN or alias of KMS key for SSE-KMS encryption of the findings bucket and findings

Conditions:
  UseKmsKey: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyArn, ""]]
  CreateMember01: !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId01, ""]]
  CreateMember02: !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId02, ""]]
  CreateMember03: !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId03, ""]]
  CreateMember04: !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId04, ""]]
  CreateMember05: !Not [!Equals [!Ref MemberAccountId05, ""]]

Resources:
  MacieFindingsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${MacieFindingsBucketPrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: !If [UseKmsKey, "aws:kms", "AES256"]
              KMSMasterKeyID: !If [UseKmsKey, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  MacieFindingsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MacieFindingsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: MacieFindingsAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub "${MacieFindingsBucket.Arn}"
              - !Sub "${MacieFindingsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:macie2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*"

  Member01:
    Type: AWS::Macie2::Member # cfn-lint: ignore E3006
    Condition: CreateMember01
    Properties:
      AccountId: !Ref MemberAccountId01
      Status: ENABLED
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MacieSensitiveDataMonitoring
    DeletionPolicy: Retain

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for storing CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management.'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: cw-export-data
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name.'
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    Default: "Yes"
    AllowedValues: ["Yes", "No"]
    Description: 'Enable S3 versioning.'
  TransitionToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: 'Days after which to transition to STANDARD_IA.'
  TransitionToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    Description: 'Days after which to transition to GLACIER.'
  ExpireAfter:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: 'Days after which to expire objects.'

Conditions:
  EnableVersioningEqYes: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "Yes"]

Resources:
  CWExportBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for CWExportBucket SSE-KMS'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 access to KMS key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExport
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  CWExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref CWExportBucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If
          - EnableVersioningEqYes
          - Enabled
          - Suspended
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DefaultLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpireAfter
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 7
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExport
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  CWExportBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CWExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureCommunications
            Effect: Deny

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "Secure private S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts with customer-managed KMS encryption. For distribution of artifacts, use presigned URLs or IAM-authorized access."

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "lambda-artifacts-bucket"
    Description: "Prefix for the S3 bucket name to ensure uniqueness"
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/lambda-service-role"
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:role/[a-zA-Z0-9/_+=,.@=-]+'
    Description: "ARN of the imported service role for KMS key usage"
  KeyDescription:
    Type: String
    Default: "Customer managed"
    Description: "Description for the KMS key"

Resources:
  LambdaArtifactsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: !Sub "${KeyDescription} for S3 Lambda artifacts encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowServiceRoleUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowS3SSE
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "s3.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "kms:ViaService": !Sub "s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  LambdaArtifactsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: "alias/lambda-artifacts-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey

  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: "S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts"
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: "ARN of the S3 bucket"
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn
  KeyArn:
    Description: "ARN of the KMS key"
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
  KeyAliasName:
    Description: "Name of the KMS key alias"
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKeyAlias

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM role for AWS Service Catalog to enable secure provisioning and management of S3 and Lambda resources in end-to-end deployment workflows.'
Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ServiceCatalogOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:CreatePortfolioShare
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:ScanProvisionedProducts
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'servicecatalog:ResourceTag/ServiceCatalog:ProductId': '*'
        - PolicyName: IAMManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:GetRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/ServiceCatalog-*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'iam:ResourceTag/ServiceCatalog:ProductId': '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:ListRoles
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaLifecycle
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:PublishVersion
                  - lambda:CreateAlias
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:ServiceCatalog-*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias:ServiceCatalog-*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:RequestedRegion: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
                  StringLike:
                    'lambda:ResourceTag/ServiceCatalog:ProductId': '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/ServiceCatalog-*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:RequestedRegion: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
                  StringLike:
                    'cloudformation:ResourceTag/ServiceCatalog:ProductId': '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStackSet
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation::${AWS::AccountId}:stackset/ServiceCatalog-*/*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    'cloudformation:ResourceTag/ServiceCatalog:ProductId': '*'
        - PolicyName: SNSIntegration
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:CreateTopic
                  - sns:DeleteTopic
                  - sns:Subscribe
                  - sns:Unsubscribe
                  - sns:Publish
                  - sns:GetTopicAttributes
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:ServiceCatalog-*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:RequestedRegion: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
                  StringLike:
                    'sns:ResourceTag/ServiceCatalog:ProductId': '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:ListTopics
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ServiceCatalogProvisioning
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to provision resources for EC2 Image Builder enabling automated, secure AMI creation, management, and logging.'

Resources:
  ImageBuilderLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'imagebuilder-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenyPutBucketPublicAccessBlockIfBlockPublicAclsDisabled
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                's3:PublicAccessBlockConfiguration.BlockPublicAcls': false
          - Sid: DenyPutBucketPublicAccessBlockIfBlockPublicPolicyDisabled
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                's3:PublicAccessBlockConfiguration.BlockPublicPolicy': false
          - Sid: DenyPutBucketPublicAccessBlockIfIgnorePublicAclsDisabled
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                's3:PublicAccessBlockConfiguration.IgnorePublicAcls': false
          - Sid: DenyPutBucketPublicAccessBlockIfRestrictPublicBucketsDisabled
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                's3:PublicAccessBlockConfiguration.RestrictPublicBuckets': false

  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ImageBuilderInstanceRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderS3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: ImageBuilderInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

Outputs:
  InstanceProfileArn:
    Description: ARN of the Image Builder Instance Profile
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceProfile.Arn
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Image Builder logs
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Image Builder Instance Role

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create an S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs with lifecycle management, AES256 encryption, versioning, strict public access blocks, and secure bucket policy for log delivery.'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional custom bucket name. Leave empty for auto-generated name.'
  VersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    Default: Enabled
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Description: 'Versioning status for the bucket.'
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days after which to transition to cheaper storage classes.'
  GlacierTransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 61
    Description: 'Days to transition current versions to GLACIER after STANDARD_IA (default: TransitionDays + 60 for cost optimization)'
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days after which to delete objects.'

Conditions:
  CustomNameProvided:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref BucketName
          - ''

Resources:
  FlowLogsBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for VPC flow logs bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogsEncryption

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::If:
          - CustomNameProvided
          - !Ref BucketName
          - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsBucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: NonCurrentVersionTransition
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref RetentionDays
          - Id: CurrentVersionTransition
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref GlacierTransitionDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-acl: bucket-owner-full-control
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketPolicyId:
    Description: ID of the bucket policy
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucketPolicy
  BucketKmsKeyId:
    Description: 'KMS Key ID for the VPC flow logs bucket'
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucketKey
