final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for a self-configuring EC2 instance with Nginx installed via SSM Association and centralized logging to S3."

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx EC2 instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 192.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sg"

  S3LogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub "KMS key for SSM logs encryption in ${AWS::StackName}"
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow SSM service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ssm-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3LogsKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ssm-logs"

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
              - s3:PutObject*
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/logs/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/logs/*"
      Path: "/"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2SSMRole
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SSMEC2Access

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT30M
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: "enabled"
        HttpTokens: "required"
        HttpPutResponseHopLimit: "1"
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y -q
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl restart amazon-ssm-agent
          sleep 60
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nginx-instance"
        - Key: SSM:Automation
          Value: "true"

  NginxInstallAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    DependsOn: EC2Instance
    Properties:
      AssociationName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nginx-install"
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - yum update -y
          - yum install -y nginx
          - systemctl enable nginx
          - systemctl start nginx
        executionTimeout: ["600"]
        outputS3BucketName: [!Ref S3Bucket]
        outputS3KeyPrefix: ["logs/"]
      Targets:
        - Key: SSM:Automation
          Values:
            - "true"
      MaxErrors: "1"

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: "ID of the EC2 instance"
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  S3BucketName:
    Description: "Name of the S3 bucket for SSM logs"
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SSMAssociationArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SSM Association for Nginx installation"
    Value: !Ref NginxInstallAssociation
  PublicDNSName:
    Description: "Public DNS name of the EC2 instance"
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an EC2 instance with automated OS updates, Nginx installation, and validation using SSM Automation, centralized S3 logging, and CloudWatch monitoring'

Parameters:
  AmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: aws:cloudformation:route-table:main
          Value: 'true'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance allowing SSH, HTTP, and all outbound traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SG'

  SSMLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  EC2InstanceSSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub '${SSMLogsBucket.Arn}/logs/*'
        - PolicyName: StartAutomation
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:StartAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:StopAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:GetAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:DescribeAutomationExecutions
                  - ssm:DescribeAutomationStepExecutions
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/${NginxAutomationDocument}'

  EC2SSMProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceSSMRole

  SSMAutomationServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: '/'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMAutomationPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:CancelCommand
                  - ssmmessages:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'ssm:resourceTag/Name': !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub '${SSMLogsBucket.Arn}/logs/*'

  TriggerNginxAutomation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      Content: !Sub |
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: Trigger Nginx Automation workflow
        parameters:
        - name: automationDocumentName
          type: String
        - name: s3BucketName
          type: String
        mainSteps:
        - action: aws:runShellScript
          name: triggerAutomation
          inputs:
            runCommand:
            - INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
            - aws ssm start-automation --document-name "{{automationDocumentName}}" --parameters "{\"instanceId\":\"$INSTANCE_ID\",\"s3Bucket\":\"{{s3BucketName}}\"}"

  NginxAutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Automation
      Content: !Sub |
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: Orchestrate OS updates, Nginx install, and validation
        parameters:
        - name: instanceId
          type: String
        - name: s3Bucket
          type: String
        assumeRole: ${SSMAutomationServiceRole.Arn}
        mainSteps:
        - name: updateOS
          action: aws:runCommand
          inputs:
            InstanceIds:
            - "{{AutomationParameterValues.instanceId}}"
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - yum check-update
              - yum update -y
              - /usr/sbin/needs-restarting -r
            OutputS3BucketName: "{{AutomationParameterValues.s3Bucket}}"
            OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/os-update
        - name: waitForReboot
          action: aws:waitForAwsResourceState
          inputs:
            ResourceWaitType: instance-state
            ResourceIds:
            - arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/{{AutomationParameterValues.instanceId}}
            DesiredStatuses:
            - running
            MaxAttempts: 60
            OnFailure: Abort
        - name: installNginx
          action: aws:runCommand
          inputs:
            InstanceIds:
            - "{{AutomationParameterValues.instanceId}}"
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - yum install -y nginx
              - systemctl daemon-reload
              - systemctl enable nginx
              - systemctl start nginx
            OutputS3BucketName: "{{AutomationParameterValues.s3Bucket}}"
            OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/nginx-install
        - name: validateNginx
          action: aws:runCommand
          inputs:
            InstanceIds:
            - "{{AutomationParameterValues.instanceId}}"
            DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
            Parameters:
              commands:
              - curl -f http://localhost -m 10 || exit 1
            timeoutSeconds: 30
            OnFailure: Abort
            OutputS3BucketName: "{{AutomationParameterValues.s3Bucket}}"
            OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/nginx-validate
            CloudWatchOutputConfig:
              CloudWatchLogGroupName: /aws/automations/nginx-setup
              CloudWatchLogStreamPrefix: validation
              CloudWatchOutputEnabled: true

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMProfile
      SsmAssociations:
        - DocumentName: !Ref TriggerNginxAutomation
          AssociationParameters:
            - Name: automationDocumentName
              Values:
                - !Ref NginxAutomationDocument
            - Name: s3BucketName
              Values:
                - !Ref SSMLogsBucket
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'

Outputs:
  EC2Instance:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  EC2PublicIp:
    Description: EC2 Public IP
    Value: !Sub '${EC2Instance.PublicIp}'
  NginxAutomationDocumentName:
    Description: Nginx Automation Document Name
    Value: !Ref NginxAutomationDocument
  SSMLogsBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for SSM Logs
    Value: !Ref SSMLogsBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Deploys a VPC, EC2 instance running latest Amazon Linux 2 with SSM access and nginx:Yes tag,
  Security Group, and custom SSM Automation document for tag-driven OS updates, conditional reboot check,
  Nginx installation, and web server validation.

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t2.micro
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: NONE
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (NONE for none)
    AllowedPattern: .*
  AllowedSSHCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR range for SSH inbound access
    AllowedPattern: '^((0|1[0-9]{0,1}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}(0|1[0-9]{0,1}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])(\/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))?$'

Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, NONE]]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  NginxWebSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx web server and SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSSHCIDR
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxWebSG'
  SSMEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMEC2Role'
  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMEC2Role
  NginxInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref NginxWebSG
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxInstance'
        - Key: nginx
          Value: "Yes"
  NginxSetupDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Automation
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSetup'
      Content: |
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: Automates OS updates, conditional reboot, Nginx installation, and validation on tagged instances
        assumeRole: 'arn:aws:iam::{{global:AccountID}}:role/AWSSystemsManagerAutomationRole'
        AutomationTargets:
          TargetInstanceIds:
            - Key: tag:nginx
              Values:
                - Yes
        mainSteps:
          UpdateOS:
            action: aws:runCommand
            name: UpdateOS
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - "sudo yum install -y yum-utils"
                  - "sudo yum update -y"
                  - "sudo needs-restarting --reboothint || true"
                InstanceIds:
                  - "{{TargetInstanceIds.[0]}}"
              timeoutSeconds: 1800
            onFailure: "Abort"
            nextStep: "CheckRebootNeeded"
          CheckRebootNeeded:
            action: aws:runCommand
            name: CheckRebootNeeded
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - "[ -f /var/run/reboot-required ] && exit 1 || exit 0"
                InstanceIds:
                  - "{{TargetInstanceIds.[0]}}"
            onFailure: "RebootIfNeeded"
            nextStep: "InstallNginx"
          RebootIfNeeded:
            action: aws:reboot
            name: RebootIfNeeded
            inputs:
              InstanceId: "{{TargetInstanceIds.[0]}}"
            onComplete: "Continue"
            onFailure: "Abort"
            nextStep: "WaitForRunning"
          WaitForRunning:
            action: aws:waitForAwsResourceState
            name: WaitForRunning
            inputs:
              ResourceIds:
                - "{{TargetInstanceIds.[0]}}"
              ResourcePropertyName: "StateName"
              DesiredValues:
                - "running"
            nextStep: "InstallNginx"
          InstallNginx:
            action: aws:runCommand
            name: InstallNginx
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - "sudo amazon-linux-extras install -y nginx1"
                  - "sudo systemctl enable nginx"
                  - "sudo systemctl start nginx"
                InstanceIds:
                  - "{{TargetInstanceIds.[0]}}"
              timeoutSeconds: 600
            onFailure: "Abort"
            nextStep: "ValidateNginx"
          ValidateNginx:
            action: aws:runCommand
            name: ValidateNginx
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - "curl -f http://localhost || exit 1"
                InstanceIds:
                  - "{{TargetInstanceIds.[0]}}"
            onFailure: "Abort"

Outputs:
  NginxInstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref NginxInstance
  NginxInstancePublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the Nginx EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt NginxInstance.PublicIp
  NginxSetupDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Automation document
    Value: !Ref NginxSetupDocument
  ExecutionInstructions:
    Description: Instructions to execute the SSM Automation
    Value:
      Fn::Join:
        - '\n'
        - 
          - '1. Go to Systems Manager > Automation > Execute automation.'
          - !Sub '2. Search for and select the document named ${NginxSetupDocument}.'
          - '3. Leave Source as ''Owned by me'' or search.'
          - '4. For Targets, select ''Add target'', Key: nginx, Values: Yes.'
          - '5. Review and Execute.'
          - '6. Monitor steps: UpdateOS, CheckRebootNeeded (branches to reboot if needed), InstallNginx, ValidateNginx.'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data for centralized governance and reporting.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'orgdata'
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name'
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default:
      - CostCenter
      - Environment
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of tag keys to include in reports'
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    Description: 'ID of the AWS Organizations management account (override placeholder with actual ID)'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'managementcur'
    Description: 'Name of the Athena/Glue database'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: 'aws:kms'
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref OrgDataKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 'TransitionToGlacier'
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 90
                StorageClass: GLACIER
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'OrgGovernance'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'DenyUnsecureTransport'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: 'DenyUnauthorizedPrincipals'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalArn':
                  - !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
                  - !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'OrgGovernance'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  LambdaExecutionRolePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaS3AndSTS'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub '${S3Bucket}/org-data/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/OrgDataReaderRole'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'OrgGovernance'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  GlueCrawlerRolePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueS3AndCatalog'
      Roles:
        - !Ref GlueCrawlerRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject*'
              - 's3:GetBucket*'
              - 's3:List*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket}/org-data/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'glue:CreateTable'
              - 'glue:GetTable'
              - 'glue:UpdateTable'
              - 'glue:DeleteTable'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:database/${AthenaDatabaseName}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AthenaDatabaseName}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  OrgDataKMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for Organizations data S3 encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow use of the key for S3 SSE'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow Lambda role access to key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow Glue role access to key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'OrgGovernance'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  OrgDataKMSAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-orgdata-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref OrgDataKMSKey

  OrgDataDatabase:
    Type: 'AWS::Glue::Database'
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: 'Catalog for AWS Organizations metadata (accounts, OUs, tags)'

  OrgDataCollectionLambda:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataCollector'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          from datetime import datetime

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              mgmt_acct = os.environ['ManagementAccountId']
              tags_include = os.environ['TagsToInclude'].split(',')
              bucket = os.environ['S3BucketName']
              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{mgmt_acct}:role/OrgDataReaderRole"

              sts = boto3.client('sts')
              assumed = sts.assume_role(
                  RoleArn=role_arn,
                  RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollectorSession'
              )
              credentials = assumed['Credentials']

              org = boto3.client(
                  'organizations',
                  aws_access_key_id=credentials['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=credentials['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=credentials['SessionToken']
              )

              data = {
                  'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z',
                  'organization': org.describe_organization()['Organization']
              }

              # Collect accounts with tags
              data['accounts'] = []
              paginator = org.get_paginator('list_accounts')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  for acct in page['Accounts']:
                      acct_data = {
                          'Id': acct['Id'],
                          'Name': acct['Name'],
                          'Status': acct['Status'],
                          'Email': acct.get('Email', '')
                      }
                      # Account tags
                      acct_tags = {}
                      try:
                          tag_pag = org.get_paginator('list_tags_for_resource')
                          for tpage in tag_pag.paginate(ResourceId=acct['Id']):
                              for tag in tpage['Tags']:
                                  if tag['Key'] in tags_include:
                                      acct_tags[tag['Key']] = tag['Value']
                      except Exception:
                          pass
                      acct_data['Tags'] = acct_tags
                      data['accounts'].append(acct_data)

              # Recursive OU hierarchy with tags
              def get_ous(parent_id):
                  ous = []
                  try:
                      ou_paginator = org.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
                      for page in ou_paginator.paginate(ParentId=parent_id):
                          for ou in page['OrganizationalUnits']:
                              ou_data = {
                                  'Id': ou['Id'],
                                  'Name': ou['Name'],
                                  'Arn': ou['Arn']
                              }
                              # OU tags
                              ou_tags = {}
                              try:
                                  tag_pag = org.get_paginator('list_tags_for_resource')
                                  for tpage in tag_pag.paginate(ResourceId=ou['Id']):
                                      for tag in tpage['Tags']:
                                          if tag['Key'] in tags_include:
                                              ou_tags[tag['Key']] = tag['Value']
                              except Exception:
                                  pass
                              ou_data['Tags'] = ou_tags
                              ou_data['Children'] = get_ous(ou['Id'])
                              ous.append(ou_data)
                  except Exception:
                      pass
                  return ous

              org_desc = org.describe_organization()
              root_id = org_desc['Organization']['RootId']
              data['hierarchy'] = {
                  'root': {
                      'Id': root_id,
                      'Children': get_ous(root_id)
                  }
              }

              # Write to S3
              s3 = boto3.client('s3')
              ts = datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%SZ')
              key = f"org-data/org-data-{ts}.json"
              s3.put_object(
                  Bucket=bucket,
                  Key=key,
                  Body=json.dumps(data, default=str, indent=2),
                  ContentType='application/json'
              )

              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Organizations data collected successfully')}
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Environment:
        Variables:
          ManagementAccountId: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          TagsToInclude:
            Fn::Join:
              - ','
              - !Ref TagsToInclude
          S3BucketName: !Ref S3Bucket
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'OrgGovernance'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  OrgDataCollectionRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Weekly schedule for Organizations data collection at 2 AM UTC Sunday'
      ScheduleExpression: 'cron(0 2 ? * SUN *)'
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrgDataCollectionLambda.Arn
          Id: 'OrgDataCollectionLambdaTarget'

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Permission'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref OrgDataCollectionLambda
      Action: 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
      Principal: 'events.amazonaws.com'
      SourceArn: !GetAtt OrgDataCollectionRule.Arn

  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: 'AWS::Glue::Crawler'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataCrawler'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Description: 'Crawler for Organizations data in S3 org-data/ prefix'
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub '${S3Bucket}/org-data/'
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: 'LOG'
        DeleteBehavior: 'LOG'
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: 'CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY'
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"},"Tables":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"MergeNewTables"}},"Grouping":{"TableGroupingPolicy":"CombineCompatibleSchemas"},"Parameters":{"classification":"json"}}'
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: 'cron(0 3 ? * SUN *)'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket storing Organizations data'
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketArn'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function collecting Organizations data'
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataCollectionLambda.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'
  GlueCrawlerArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Glue Crawler cataloging Organizations data'
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:crawler/${OrgDataCrawler}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerArn'
  GlueDatabaseName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue/Athena database for querying Organizations data'
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueDatabaseName'
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule scheduling data collection'
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataCollectionRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRuleArn'
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key used for S3 encryption'
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataKMSKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure multi-AZ VPC architecture with public/private subnets and NAT Gateway high availability following AWS Well-Architected security best practices'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: Infrastructure

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public
        - Key: AZ
          Value: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Standardized IAM Baseline for Account Governance'

Parameters:
  IdentityManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '000000000000'
    Description: 'Account ID of the Identity Management account'
  ToolingManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '000000000000'
    Description: 'Account ID of the Tooling Management account'

Resources:
  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: PrivilegedAdmin
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenySensitiveOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'aws-portal:*'
                  - 'ce:*'
                  - 'billingconductor:*'
                  - 'cloudhsm:*'
                  - 'iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole'
                Resource: '*'

  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: RestrictedAdmin
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/PowerUserAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenySensitiveOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'aws-portal:*'
                  - 'ce:*'
                  - 'billingconductor:*'
                  - 'cloudhsm:*'
                  - 'iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole'
                Resource: '*'

  IdentityAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: IdentityAdmin
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMFullAccess'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenySensitiveOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'aws-portal:*'
                  - 'ce:*'
                  - 'billingconductor:*'
                  - 'cloudhsm:*'
                  - 'iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole'
                Resource: '*'

  PrivilegedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: PrivilegedAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ToolingManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalTag/role: 'PrivilegedAdmin'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenySensitiveOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'aws-portal:*'
                  - 'ce:*'
                  - 'billingconductor:*'
                  - 'cloudhsm:*'
                  - 'iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole'
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: PrivilegedAdminPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                NotAction:
                  - 'iam:*'
                  - 'ec2:RunInstances'
                  - 'rds:CreateDBInstance'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:*'
                  - 'ec2:RunInstances'
                  - 'rds:CreateDBInstance'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'IAMBaseline'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  RestrictedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RestrictedAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ToolingManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalTag/role: 'RestrictedAdmin'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenySensitiveOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'aws-portal:*'
                  - 'ce:*'
                  - 'billingconductor:*'
                  - 'cloudhsm:*'
                  - 'iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole'
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: RestrictedAdminPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ec2:Describe*'
                  - 'ec2:StartInstances'
                  - 'ec2:StopInstances'
                  - 'ec2:RebootInstances'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 'ec2:CreateTags'
                  - 'ec2:DeleteTags'
                  - 'ec2:Describe*'
                  - 'ec2:ModifyVpcAttribute'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'IAMBaseline'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  IdentityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: IdentityAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalTag/role: 'IdentityAdmin'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenySensitiveOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'aws-portal:*'
                  - 'ce:*'
                  - 'billingconductor:*'
                  - 'cloudhsm:*'
                  - 'iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole'
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: IdentityAdminPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                NotAction:
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'IAMBaseline'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  CFNExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CFNExecutionRole
      Path: '/baseline/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CFNPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:*'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'organizations:Describe*'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'IAMBaseline'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  StackSetsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: StackSetsExecutionRole
      Path: '/baseline/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sts.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: 'StackSetsExecutionRole'
                sts:SourceIdentity: 'AWSStackSetsExecutionRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackSetsPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:*'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stackset/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:change-set/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'IAMBaseline'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

Outputs:
  PrivilegedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for PrivilegedAdminRole'
    Value: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminRole.Arn
  RestrictedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for RestrictedAdminRole'
    Value: !GetAtt RestrictedAdminRole.Arn
  IdentityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for IdentityAdminRole'
    Value: !GetAtt IdentityAdminRole.Arn
  CFNExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for CFNExecutionRole'
    Value: !GetAtt CFNExecutionRole.Arn
  StackSetsExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN for StackSetsExecutionRole'
    Value: !GetAtt StackSetsExecutionRole.Arn
  PrivilegedAdminGroupArn:
    Description: 'ARN for PrivilegedAdminGroup'
    Value: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminGroup.Arn
  RestrictedAdminGroupArn:
    Description: 'ARN for RestrictedAdminGroup'
    Value: !GetAtt RestrictedAdminGroup.Arn
  IdentityAdminGroupArn:
    Description: 'ARN for IdentityAdminGroup'
    Value: !GetAtt IdentityAdminGroup.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'VPC with Flow Logs to secure S3 bucket - monitors network traffic patterns with public access blocked, SSL enforced, and minimal permissions for log delivery.'

Parameters:
  VPCCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: flowlogs
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  LogFilePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional prefix for flow log files in S3 (e.g., aws/vpc/flowlogs)
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT
    Description: Type of traffic to log
  LogFormat:
    Type: String
    Default: >-
      ${version} ${account-id} ${interface-id} ${srcaddr} ${dstaddr} ${srcport} ${dstport} ${protocol} ${packets} ${bytes} ${start} ${end} ${action} ${log-status}
    Description: Custom log format for comprehensive metadata fields

Conditions:
  UseLogFilePrefix: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref LogFilePrefix
      - ''

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  FlowLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs encryption in bucket ${BucketNamePrefix}-flowlogs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable Root Access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Logs Delivery Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'AWS:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-flowlogs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}/*'

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-flowlogs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKMSKey

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
              - s3:PutBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !If
                - UseLogFilePrefix
                - !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/${LogFilePrefix}/*'
                - !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  VPCFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      MaxAggregationInterval: 600
      LogFormat: !Ref LogFormat
      LogDestinationType: s3
      LogDestination: !If
        - UseLogFilePrefix
        - !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket}/${LogFilePrefix}/'
        - !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      DestinationOptions:
        FileFormat: 'plain-text'
        HiveCompatiblePartitions: true
        PerHourPartition: true

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the created VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
  FlowLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket storing VPC flow logs (for integration with downstream systems)
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for AWS Workloads Risk Management System with DynamoDB, Lambda functions, IAM role, and SNS notifications.

Resources:
  RiskManagementTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: RiskManagementTable
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  LambdaRiskManagementRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaRiskManagementRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAndLogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan

      Tags:

          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RiskIngestionLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: RiskIngestionLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Risk Ingestion Lambda')
              }
      MemorySize: 256
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskManagementTable
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RiskAnalysisLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: RiskAnalysisLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Risk Analysis Lambda')
              }
      MemorySize: 256
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskManagementTable
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SNSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SNS RiskNotificationsTopic encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RiskNotificationsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: RiskNotificationsTopic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RiskNotificationsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: OpsCenterPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: opscenter.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic

Outputs:
  RiskManagementTableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table for risk management data
    Value: !Ref RiskManagementTable

  RiskNotificationsTopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for risk notifications
    Value: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic

  RiskIngestionLambdaARN:
    Description: ARN of the RiskIngestionLambda function
    Value: !GetAtt RiskIngestionLambda.Arn

  RiskAnalysisLambdaARN:
    Description: ARN of the RiskAnalysisLambda function
    Value: !GetAtt RiskAnalysisLambda.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates a lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation, which includes a VPC, managed instances, and an admin instance preconfigured with scheduling tools.'

Mappings:
  AmazonLinux2AMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0c03a8c549ae18e2b

Resources:
  LabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LabVPC'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  LabIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LabIGW'
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  LabVPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref LabIGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  AutomationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PassRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SNSPublish
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SSMAutomationPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:SendAutomationSignal
                  - ssm:GetAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:StartAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:StopAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:CancelCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                  - ec2:DescribeRegions
                Resource: '*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchReadOnlyAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchLogsReadOnlyAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonRDSReadOnlyAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSCloudFormationReadOnlyAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonECS_FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchSyntheticsReadOnlyAccess
      Path: "/"
      RoleName: "AutomationRole"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket with event-driven notifications to an SNS topic for s3:ObjectCreated:* events, automating alerts or workflows when new objects are uploaded. Includes security best practices like encryption, versioning, and public access blocks.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9-]*$'
    MaxLength: 20
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the S3 bucket name (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only).'

Resources:
  SNSTopicKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for SNS topic ${AWS::StackName}-S3ObjectCreatedAlerts'
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-S3ObjectCreatedAlerts'

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: S3-ObjectCreated-Alerts
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3ObjectCreatedAlerts'
      FifoTopic: false
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSTopicKMSKey

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3Publish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-S3ObjectCreatedAlerts'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-s3-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DependsOn:
      - SNSTopicPolicy
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-s3-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Topic: !Ref SNSTopic

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the provisioned S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the provisioned S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic receiving S3 event notifications'
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  SNSTopicName:
    Description: 'Name of the SNS topic receiving S3 event notifications'
    Value: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure admin-managed Cognito User Pool with hosted UI domain, OAuth-enabled clients for web and admin apps, email verification, strong password policy, and no self-signup.'

Parameters:
  UserPoolName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecureAppUserPool
    Description: Name for the Cognito User Pool
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: myapp-secure
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9\-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    Description: Custom prefix for the User Pool Domain (must be unique)
  CallbackUrls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'https://localhost:3000/callback'
    Description: Callback URLs for OAuth flows
  LogoutUrls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'https://localhost:3000/'
    Description: Logout URLs for OAuth flows
  AllowedOAuthFlows:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'code,implicit'
    Description: Allowed OAuth flows (e.g., code,implicit)
  AllowedOAuthScopes:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'email,openid,phone,profile'
    Description: Allowed OAuth scopes

Resources:
  SecureAppUserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Ref UserPoolName
      UsernameConfiguration:
        CaseSensitive: false
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
        InviteMessageTemplate:
          EmailSubject: !Join ['', ['Invitation to join ', !Ref UserPoolName]]
          EmailMessage: |
            Hello {{{.Username}}},

            Your account has been created. Please use the following verification code to complete setup:

            {{{.Code}}}

            Thank you!
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
          TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
      VerificationMessageTemplate:
        EmailSubject: 'Email Verification Code'
        EmailMessage: 'Your verification code is {{{.Code}}}'
        EmailMessageByLink: 'Please verify your email by clicking here: {{{.Link}}}'

  SecureAppDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Ref DomainPrefix
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureAppUserPool

  WebAppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureAppUserPool
      ClientName: WebAppClient
      GenerateSecret: false
      RefreshTokenValidity: 2592000
      AccessTokenValidity: 3600
      IdTokenValidity: 3600
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackUrls
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutUrls
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows: !Ref AllowedOAuthFlows
      AllowedOAuthScopes: !Ref AllowedOAuthScopes
      SupportedIdentityProviders:
        - COGNITO

  AdminClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureAppUserPool
      ClientName: AdminClient
      GenerateSecret: true
      RefreshTokenValidity: 604800
      AccessTokenValidity: 3600
      IdTokenValidity: 3600
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackUrls
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutUrls
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows: !Ref AllowedOAuthFlows
      AllowedOAuthScopes: !Ref AllowedOAuthScopes
      SupportedIdentityProviders:
        - COGNITO

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref SecureAppUserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId'
  WebAppClientId:
    Description: Web App User Pool Client ID
    Value: !Ref WebAppClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebAppClientId'
  AdminClientId:
    Description: Admin User Pool Client ID
    Value: !Ref AdminClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminClientId'
  UserPoolDomain:
    Description: Full Hosted UI Domain URL
    Value: !Sub 'https://${SecureAppDomain}.auth.${AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolDomain'
  ProviderName:
    Description: Provider name for integration
    Value: !Sub 'Cognito-${UserPoolName}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ProviderName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Creates an event-driven integration between AWS EventBridge and a MongoDB API endpoint for processing or logging application events."

Parameters:
  MongoDBURL:
    Type: String
    Default: "www.testanu.com"
  ApiKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: "test_name"
    NoEcho: true
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    Default: "test_value"
    NoEcho: true

Resources:
  MongoDBIntegrationBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: "MongoDBIntegrationBus"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeDLQKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for EventBridge DLQ encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Enable root access"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow SQS service to use key"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - "kms:Encrypt"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:ReEncrypt*"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
              - "kms:DescribeKey"
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "kms:ViaService": !Sub "sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EventBridgeDLQKey
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeApiDestinationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "events.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "EventBridgeLogsPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "logs:CreateLogGroup"
                  - "logs:CreateLogStream"
                  - "logs:PutLogEvents"
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/events/${AWS::StackName}-*:*"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "sqs:SendMessage"
                Resource: !GetAtt EventBridgeDLQ.Arn
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
                  - "kms:Decrypt"
                Resource: !GetAtt EventBridgeDLQKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: "MongoDBConnection"
      AuthorizationType: "API_KEY"
      Description: "MongoDB integration"
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: !Ref ApiKeyName
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: "MongoDBApiDestination"
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: !Sub "https://${MongoDBURL}"
      HttpMethod: "POST"
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  RouteToMongoDBRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref MongoDBIntegrationBus
      Description: "Route custom application events to MongoDB API destination"
      State: "ENABLED"
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - prefix: "myapp"
      Targets:
        - Id: "MongoDBTarget"
          Arn: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiDestinationRole.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt EventBridgeDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: "Project"
          Value: "EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration"
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: "ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus"
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBIntegrationBus.Arn
  APIDestinationArn:
    Description: "ARN of the EventBridge API Destination"
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: "URL of the Dead Letter Queue for failed deliveries"
    Value: !Ref EventBridgeDLQ
  RuleArn:
