final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template to create a REST API Gateway integrated with Amazon Kinesis Data Streams, providing HTTP endpoints for PutRecord, PutRecords, GetShardIterator, GetRecords, DescribeStream, and ListShards operations.

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyDataStream
    Description: Name of the Kinesis stream
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis stream

Resources:
  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ApiLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/apigateway/${AWS::StackName}'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  KinesisApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: KinesisDataApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - application/octet-stream
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ApiGatewayKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${KinesisApi}/*/*/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:kinesis:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stream/${StreamName}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PutRecordResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: put-record

  PutRecordMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref PutRecordResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecord'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$util.escapeJavaScript(${stageVariables.StreamName})",
              "Data": "$util.base64Encode($input.json('$.Data'))",
              "PartitionKey": "$input.json('$.PartitionKey')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: "$input.json('$')"

  PutRecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: put-records

  PutRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref PutRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecords'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
            {
              "StreamName": "$util.escapeJavaScript(${stageVariables.StreamName})",
              "Records": [
                #foreach($record in $inputRoot.Records)
                {
                  "Data": "$util.base64Encode($record.Data)",
                  "PartitionKey": "$record.PartitionKey"
                }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                #end
              ]
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: "$input.json('$')"

  GetShardIteratorResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: get-shard-iterator

  GetShardIteratorMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref GetShardIteratorResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetShardIterator'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$util.escapeJavaScript(${stageVariables.StreamName})",
              "ShardId": "$input.json('$.ShardId')",
              "ShardIteratorType": "$input.json('$.ShardIteratorType')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                {
                  "ShardIterator": "$inputRoot.ShardIterator"
                }

  GetRecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: get-records

  GetRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref GetRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetRecords'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "ShardIterator": "$input.json('$.ShardIterator')",
              "Limit": $input.json('$.Limit')
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                {
                  "NextShardIterator": "$inputRoot.NextShardIterator",
                  "Records": [
                    #if($inputRoot.Records)
                      #foreach($record in $inputRoot.Records)
                        {
                          "Data": "$util.base64Decode($record.Data)",
                          "PartitionKey": "$record.PartitionKey",
                          "ApproximateArrivalTimestamp": "$record.ApproximateArrivalTimestamp",
                          "SequenceNumber": "$record.SequenceNumber"
                        }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                      #end
                    #end
                  ]
                }

  DescribeStreamResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: describe-stream

  DescribeStreamMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref DescribeStreamResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/DescribeStream'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$util.escapeJavaScript(${stageVariables.StreamName})"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                $util.toJson($inputRoot.StreamDescription)

  ListShardsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: list-shards

  ListShardsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ListShardsResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/ListShards'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$util.escapeJavaScript(${stageVariables.StreamName})",
              "MaxResults": "100"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: "$input.json('$')"

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
    DependsOn:
      - PutRecordMethod
      - PutRecordsMethod
      - GetShardIteratorMethod
      - GetRecordsMethod
      - DescribeStreamMethod
      - ListShardsMethod

  ApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      Variables:
        StreamName: !Ref StreamName
      TracingEnabled: true
      AccessLogSetting:
        DestinationArn: !GetAtt ApiLogGroup.Arn
        Format: |
          {
            "requestId":"$context.requestId",
            "ip": "$context.identity.sourceIp",
            "requestTime":"$context.requestTime",
            "httpMethod":"$context.httpMethod",
            "resourcePath":"$context.resourcePath",
            "status":"$context.status",
            "protocol":"$context.protocol",
            "responseLength":"$context.responseLength"
          }
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  KinesisUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: KinesisUsagePlan
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
          Stage: !Ref ApiStage
          Throttle:
            BurstLimit: 100
            RateLimit: 50.0
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  KinesisApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Name: KinesisApiKey
      Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  UsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref KinesisApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref KinesisUsagePlan

Outputs:

    Description: The invoke URL of the API
    Value: !Sub 'https://${KinesisApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${ApiStage}/'
  StreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream

  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM Role for API Gateway

    Description: ID of the API Key
    Value: !Ref KinesisApiKey

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic EFS FileSystem for testing shared storage in us-east-1a'

Resources:
  TestingVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EFS-Testing-Shared-Storage

  TestingSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      VpcId: !Ref TestingVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Subnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EFS-Testing-Shared-Storage

  EFSMountTargetSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow NFS access to EFS mount target
      VpcId: !Ref TestingVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: !GetAtt TestingVPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt TestingVPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSMountTargetSG'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EFS-Testing-Shared-Storage

  TestingEFS:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      BackupPolicy:
        Status: DISABLED
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EFS-Testing-Shared-Storage

  TestingMountTarget:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref TestingEFS
      SubnetId: !Ref TestingSubnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSG

Outputs:
  FileSystemId:
    Description: EFS FileSystem ID
    Value: !Ref TestingEFS
  MountTargetId:
    Description: EFS Mount Target ID
    Value: !Ref TestingMountTarget
  MountTargetDnsName:
    Description: DNS name for mounting EFS in us-east-1a (use with TLS for security, e.g., sudo mount -t efs -o tls ${MountTargetDnsName}:/ /mnt/efs)
    Value: !Sub '${TestingEFS}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
  MountTargetIpAddress:
    Description: Mount target IP address in us-east-1a subnet for direct NFS mounting
    Value: !GetAtt TestingMountTarget.IpAddress

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that deploys a Lambda function to selectively disable specific AWS Security Hub controls (CIS Benchmarks and AWS Foundational Security Best Practices) based on parameters.'

Parameters:
  DisableCISControls:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of CIS Benchmark control IDs to disable, e.g., "1.40,2.1a"'
  DisableFSBPControls:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of AWS FSBP control IDs to disable, e.g., "1.1,2.2"'
  LogRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    AllowedValues:
      - 1
      - 3
      - 5
      - 7
      - 14
      - 30
      - 60
      - 90
      - 120
      - 150
      - 180
      - 365
      - 400
      - 545
      - 731
      - 1096
      - 1827
      - 2192
      - 2557
      - 2922
      - 3288
      - 3653
    Description: 'Retention period in days for CloudWatch Logs.'
  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional ARN of the IAM permissions boundary to apply to the Lambda execution role.'
  LambdaTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 900
    Description: 'Lambda function timeout in seconds.'
  DlqSnsTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional ARN of SNS topic to use as Dead Letter Queue for the Lambda function.'
  InvokePrincipal:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional AWS service principal allowed to invoke the Lambda function, e.g., "ssm.amazonaws.com".'

Conditions:
  HasPermissionsBoundary: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn, '' ] ]
  HasDlq: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref DlqSnsTopicArn, '' ] ]
  HasInvokePermission: !Not [ !Equals [ !Ref InvokePrincipal, '' ] ]

Resources:
  LambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManager'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecurityHubControlManager

  SecurityHubControlManagerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManagerRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary:
        Fn::If:
          - HasPermissionsBoundary
          - !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecurityHubControlManager

  LambdaLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaLogsPolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - "logs:CreateLogGroup"
              - "logs:CreateLogStream"
              - "logs:PutLogEvents"
            Resource: 'arn:aws:logs:*:*:log-group:/aws/lambda/*:*'
      Roles:
        - !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerRole

  SecurityHubPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubPolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - "securityhub:DescribeStandardsControls"
              - "securityhub:UpdateStandardsControl"
            Resource: '*'
      Roles:
        - !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerRole

  SecurityHubControlManagerFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManager'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerRole.Arn
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Timeout: !Ref LambdaTimeoutSeconds
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              sh = boto3.client('securityhub')
              region = sh.meta.region_name
              disabled = []
              errors = []

              # Process CIS controls
              cis_standard_arn = 'arn:aws:securityhub:::ruleset/cis-aws-foundations-benchmark/v/1.4.0'
              cis_ids = [cid.strip() for cid in os.environ.get('DISABLE_CIS_CONTROLS', '').split(',') if cid.strip()]
              if cis_ids:
                  controls = []
                  next_token = None
                  while True:
                      kwargs = {'StandardsArn': cis_standard_arn}
                      if next_token:
                          kwargs['NextToken'] = next_token
                      resp = sh.describe_standards_controls(**kwargs)
                      controls.extend(resp['Controls'])
                      next_token = resp.get('NextToken')
                      if not next_token:
                          break
                  for ctrl in controls:
                      if ctrl['ControlId'] in cis_ids:
                          try:
                              sh.update_standards_control(
                                  StandardsControlArn=ctrl['StandardsControlArn'],
                                  ControlStatus='DISABLED'
                              )
                              disabled.append(ctrl['StandardsControlArn'])
                          except Exception as e:
                              errors.append(f"CIS {ctrl['ControlId']}: {str(e)}")

              # Process FSBP controls
              fsbp_standard_arn = f'arn:aws:securityhub:{region}::standards/aws-foundational-security-best-practices/v/1.0.0'
              fsbp_ids = [fid.strip() for fid in os.environ.get('DISABLE_FSBPCONTROLS', '').split(',') if fid.strip()]
              if fsbp_ids:
                  controls = []
                  next_token = None
                  while True:
                      kwargs = {'StandardsArn': fsbp_standard_arn}
                      if next_token:
                          kwargs['NextToken'] = next_token
                      resp = sh.describe_standards_controls(**kwargs)
                      controls.extend(resp['Controls'])
                      next_token = resp.get('NextToken')
                      if not next_token:
                          break
                  for ctrl in controls:
                      if ctrl['ControlId'] in fsbp_ids:
                          try:
                              sh.update_standards_control(
                                  StandardsControlArn=ctrl['StandardsControlArn'],
                                  ControlStatus='DISABLED'
                              )
                              disabled.append(ctrl['StandardsControlArn'])
                          except Exception as e:
                              errors.append(f"FSBP {ctrl['ControlId']}: {str(e)}")

              print(f"Disabled {len(disabled)} controls.")
              if errors:
                  print("Errors:")
                  for error in errors:
                      print(error)
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 500,
                      'body': json.dumps({
                          'message': 'Some controls failed to disable.',
                          'errors': errors, 
                          'disabled': disabled
                      })
                  }
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps({
                      'message': 'All specified controls disabled successfully.', 
                      'disabled': disabled
                  })
              }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          DISABLE_CIS_CONTROLS: !Ref DisableCISControls
          DISABLE_FSBPCONTROLS: !Ref DisableFSBPControls
      DeadLetterConfig:
        Fn::If:
          - HasDlq
          - TargetArn: !Ref DlqSnsTopicArn
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecurityHubControlManager

  InvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Condition: HasInvokePermission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerFunction.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: !Ref InvokePrincipal

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function.
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerFunction.Arn
  IamRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role.
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerRole.Arn
  LogGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Logs group.
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaLogGroup.Arn
  DisabledControlsSummary:
    Description: Summary of controls targeted for disabling.
    Value: !Sub 'CIS: ${DisableCISControls}, FSBP: ${DisableFSBPControls}'
deploy_logs: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure and compliant AWS Config setup with customizable retention policies and delivery configurations, automating resource configuration tracking and audit logging across an AWS account.

Parameters:
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2557
    MinValue: 7
    MaxValue: 2557
    Description: Number of days to retain AWS Config items (7-2557)
  DeliveryFrequency:
    Type: String
    Default: Hourly
    AllowedValues:
      - Hourly
      - Daily
    Description: Snapshot delivery frequency (Hourly=OneHour, Daily=TwentyFourHours)
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of existing S3 bucket for Config storage (leave empty to create new)
  ConfigRecorderName:
    Type: String
    Default: ConfigRecorder
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 256
    Description: Name of the AWS Config Configuration Recorder
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional ARN of an IAM permission boundary policy to apply to service roles

Conditions:
  CreateBucket: !Equals [!Ref BucketName, '']
  UsePermissionBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, '']]
  IsDaily: !Equals [!Ref DeliveryFrequency, 'Daily']

Resources:
  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Condition: CreateBucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-config-${AWS::Region}"
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ConfigRetention
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: AWSConfigCompliance

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Condition: CreateBucket
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: ConfigServiceAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: config.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:GetObject*'
              - 's3:DeleteObject*'
              - 's3:GetBucketAcl'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}/*"

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: ConfigNotificationTopic
      DisplayName: AWS Config Notifications
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: AWSConfigCompliance

  ConfigRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: config.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: '/'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UsePermissionBoundary, !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: AWSConfigCompliance

  ConfigServicePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: ConfigServicePolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:GetObject*'
              - 's3:DeleteObject*'
              - 's3:GetBucketAcl'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !If [CreateBucket, !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}", !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketName}"]
              - !If [CreateBucket, !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}/*", !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketName}/*"]
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
      Roles:
        - !Ref ConfigRole

  ConfigRecorder:
    Type: AWS::Config::ConfigurationRecorder
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ConfigRecorderName
      RoleARN: !GetAtt ConfigRole.Arn
      RecordingGroup:
        AllSupported: true
        IncludeGlobalResourceTypes: true
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  DeliveryChannel:
    Type: AWS::Config::DeliveryChannel
    Properties:
      S3BucketName: !If [CreateBucket, !Ref Bucket, !Ref BucketName]
      SnsTopicARN: !Ref SNSTopic
      ConfigSnapshotDeliveryProperties:
        DeliveryFrequency: !If [IsDaily, 'TwentyFourHours', 'OneHour']

  RetentionLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UsePermissionBoundary, !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RetentionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - config:PutRetentionConfiguration
                  - config:DeleteRetentionConfiguration
                  - config:DescribeRetentionConfigurations
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: AWSConfigCompliance

  RetentionManager:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt RetentionLambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import cfnresponse
          def handler(event, context):
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              retention_days = int(props.get('RetentionDays', 2557))
              physical_resource_id = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', f"retention-{retention_days}")
              try:
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  config_client = boto3.client('config')
                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      try:
                          config_client.delete_retention_configuration()
                      except config_client.exceptions.NoSuchRetentionConfigurationException:
                          pass
                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {}, physical_resource_id)
                      return
                  # Create or Update
                  config_client.put_retention_configuration(
                      RetentionPeriodInDays=retention_days
                  )
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {'RetentionDays': retention_days}, physical_resource_id)
              except Exception as e:
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {'Error': str(e)}, physical_resource_id)

  LambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref RetentionManager
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cfn.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*"

  ConfigRetention:
    Type: Custom::ConfigRetention
    DependsOn: ConfigRecorder
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${RetentionManager}"
      RetentionDays: !Ref RetentionDays

Outputs:
  ConfigRecorderName:
    Description: Name of the AWS Config Configuration Recorder
    Value: !Ref ConfigRecorderName
  DeliveryChannelArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Config Delivery Channel
    Value: !GetAtt DeliveryChannel.Arn
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic for Config notifications
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 Bucket used for Config storage
    Value: !If [CreateBucket, !Ref Bucket, !Ref BucketName]
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function managing Config retention
    Value: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${RetentionManager}"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an account-wide IAM password policy with customizable security requirements, a Lambda function for dynamic management, and optional permission boundary.'

Parameters:
  MinimumPasswordLength:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    MinValue: 6
    MaxValue: 128
    Description: 'Minimum password length (6-128 characters)'
  RequireUppercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: 'Require uppercase characters'
  RequireLowercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: 'Require lowercase characters'
  RequireNumbers:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: 'Require numbers'
  RequireSymbols:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: 'Require symbols'
  MaxPasswordAge:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1095
    Description: 'Maximum password age in days (0-1095)'
  PasswordReusePrevention:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 24
    Description: 'Number of previous passwords to prevent reuse (1-24)'
  AllowUsersToChangePassword:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: 'Allow users to change their own password'
  EnablePermissionBoundary:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: 'Enable optional IAM permission boundary policy'

Conditions:
  CreatePermissionBoundary:
    Fn::Equals:
      - !Ref EnablePermissionBoundary
      - 'true'

Resources:
  PasswordPolicyLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PasswordPolicyManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:GetAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:UpdateAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:DeleteAccountPasswordPolicy
                Resource: '*'
    Tags:
      - Key: ManagedBy
        Value: CloudFormation
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: IAMPasswordPolicy

  PasswordPolicyManager:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import boto3
          import logging
          import os

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          SUCCESS = "SUCCESS"
          FAILED = "FAILED"

          def send_response(event, context, status, data, physical_resource_id):
              response_url = event["ResponseURL"]
              response_body = {
                  "Status": status,
                  "Reason": f"See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream: {context.log_stream_name}",
                  "PhysicalResourceId": physical_resource_id or context.aws_request_id,
                  "StackId": event["StackId"],
                  "RequestId": event["RequestId"],
                  "LogicalResourceId": event["LogicalResourceId"],
                  "Data": data
              }
              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)
              logger.info(f"Sending response: {json_response_body}")
              headers = {
                  "content-type": "",
                  "content-length": str(len(json_response_body))
              }
              try:
                  req = urllib.request.Request(
                      response_url,
                      data=json_response_body.encode("utf-8"),
                      method="PUT",
                      headers=headers
                  )
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as response:
                      logger.info(f"Response status: {response.status}")
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Failed to send response: {str(e)}")

          def get_bool_value(val, default_env_key):
              if val is not None:
                  return str(val).lower() == "true"
              default = os.environ.get(default_env_key, "true")
              return default.lower() == "true"

          def get_int_value(val, default_env_key):
              if val is not None:
                  return int(val)
              default = os.environ.get(default_env_key, "14")
              return int(default)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              logger.info(f"Event: {json.dumps(event)}")
              physical_resource_id = event.get("PhysicalResourceId", "AccountPasswordPolicy")
              try:
                  if "ResponseURL" in event:
                      # CloudFormation Custom Resource
                      request_type = event["RequestType"]
                      if request_type == "Delete":
                          iam = boto3.client("iam")
                          try:
                              iam.delete_account_password_policy()
                              logger.info("Password policy deleted")
                          except iam.exceptions.NoSuchEntityException:
                              logger.info("No password policy existed")
                          send_response(event, context, SUCCESS, {"Message": "Policy removed"}, physical_resource_id)
                          return
                      else:  # Create or Update
                          action = "apply"
                          policy_config = event["ResourceProperties"].get("PolicyConfig", {})
                  else:
                      # Direct invocation
                      action = event.get("Action", "apply")
                      policy_config = event.get("PolicyConfig", {})

                  if action == "remove":
                      iam = boto3.client("iam")
                      try:
                          iam.delete_account_password_policy()
                          message = "Password policy deleted"
                      except iam.exceptions.NoSuchEntityException:
                          message = "No password policy existed"
                      if "ResponseURL" in event:
                          send_response(event, context, SUCCESS, {"Message": message}, physical_resource_id)
                      else:
                          return {"statusCode": 200, "body": json.dumps({"Message": message})}
                  elif action == "apply":
                      min_length = get_int_value(policy_config.get("MinimumPasswordLength"), "DefaultMinLength")
                      require_upper = get_bool_value(policy_config.get("RequireUppercaseCharacters"), "DefaultRequireUppercaseCharacters")
                      require_lower = get_bool_value(policy_config.get("RequireLowercaseCharacters"), "DefaultRequireLowercaseCharacters")
                      require_numbers = get_bool_value(policy_config.get("RequireNumbers"), "DefaultRequireNumbers")
                      require_symbols = get_bool_value(policy_config.get("RequireSymbols"), "DefaultRequireSymbols")
                      max_age = get_int_value(policy_config.get("MaxPasswordAge"), "DefaultMaxPasswordAge")
                      reuse_prevention = get_int_value(policy_config.get("PasswordReusePrevention"), "DefaultPasswordReusePrevention")
                      allow_change = get_bool_value(policy_config.get("AllowUsersToChangePassword"), "DefaultAllowUsersToChangePassword")

                      iam = boto3.client("iam")
                      iam.update_account_password_policy(
                          MinimumPasswordLength=min_length,
                          RequireUppercaseCharacters=require_upper,
                          RequireLowercaseCharacters=require_lower,
                          RequireNumbers=require_numbers,
                          RequireSymbols=require_symbols,
                          MaxPasswordAge=max_age,
                          PasswordReusePrevention=reuse_prevention,
                          AllowUsersToChangePassword=allow_change
                      )
                      message = "Password policy applied successfully"
                      if "ResponseURL" in event:
                          send_response(event, context, SUCCESS, {"Message": message}, physical_resource_id)
                      else:
                          return {"statusCode": 200, "body": json.dumps({"Message": message})}
                  else:
                      raise ValueError(f"Unknown action: {action}")
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Error: {str(e)}")
                  if "ResponseURL" in event:
                      send_response(event, context, FAILED, {}, physical_resource_id, str(e))
                  else:
                      return {"statusCode": 500, "body": json.dumps({"Error": str(e)})}

        Environment:
          Variables:
            DefaultMinLength: '14'
            DefaultRequireUppercaseCharacters: 'true'
            DefaultRequireLowercaseCharacters: 'true'
            DefaultRequireNumbers: 'true'
            DefaultRequireSymbols: 'true'
            DefaultMaxPasswordAge: '90'
            DefaultPasswordReusePrevention: '24'
            DefaultAllowUsersToChangePassword: 'true'
      Timeout: 30
    Tags:
      - Key: ManagedBy
        Value: CloudFormation
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: IAMPasswordPolicy

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref PasswordPolicyManager
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cloudformation.amazonaws.com

  AccountPasswordPolicy:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn
      Action: 'apply'
      PolicyConfig:
        MinimumPasswordLength: !Ref MinimumPasswordLength
        RequireUppercaseCharacters: !Ref RequireUppercaseCharacters
        RequireLowercaseCharacters: !Ref RequireLowercaseCharacters
        RequireNumbers: !Ref RequireNumbers
        RequireSymbols: !Ref RequireSymbols
        MaxPasswordAge: !Ref MaxPasswordAge
        PasswordReusePrevention: !Ref PasswordReusePrevention
        AllowUsersToChangePassword: !Ref AllowUsersToChangePassword

  IAMPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Condition: CreatePermissionBoundary
    ManagedPolicyName: !Sub 'IAMPermissionBoundary-${AWS::AccountId}'
    Description: 'Least-privilege permission boundary for IAM users and roles'
    PolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Deny
          Action:
            - iam:CreateAccessKey
          Resource: '*'
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - 'ec2:Describe*'
            - 's3:Get*'
            - 's3:List*'
          Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  PasswordPolicyMinLength:
    Description: 'Configured minimum password length'
    Value: !Ref MinimumPasswordLength
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for dynamic password policy management'
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the optional IAM permission boundary policy'
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreatePermissionBoundary
        - !Ref IAMPermissionBoundary
        - 'Permission boundary not enabled'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Centralized SNS Alerting System with Fallback'

Parameters:
  StackNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Prefix for resource names (e.g., prod-)'
  MainEmailEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Primary email endpoint (leave empty to skip)'
  HttpsEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'HTTPS webhook endpoint (leave empty to skip)'
  FallbackEmail:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Fallback email address (required)'
  AlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 0
    Description: 'Alarm threshold for number of failed notifications'
  KmsMasterKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: 'alias/aws/sns'
    Description: 'KMS master key ID for SNS encryption (default AWS-managed)'

Conditions:
  HasMainEmail:
    Fn::Not:
    - Fn::Equals:
      - !Ref MainEmailEndpoint
      - ''
  HasHttpsEndpoint:
    Fn::Not:
    - Fn::Equals:
      - !Ref HttpsEndpoint
      - ''

Resources:
  PrimaryTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}CentralAlertingTopic'
      DisplayName: Centralized AWS Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KmsMasterKeyId
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralAlerting
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrimaryTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref PrimaryTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarms
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref PrimaryTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudwatch:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alarm:*'
          - Sid: AllowRDSNotifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref PrimaryTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:rds:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'
          - Sid: AllowS3Notifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref PrimaryTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: 'arn:aws:s3:::*'
          - Sid: AllowBudgetsNotifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: budgets.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref PrimaryTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:budgets::${AWS::AccountId}:budget/*'

  FallbackTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}FallbackAlertingTopic'
      DisplayName: Fallback Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KmsMasterKeyId
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CentralAlerting
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FallbackEmailSub:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmail
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  MainEmailSub:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasMainEmail
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimaryTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref MainEmailEndpoint
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  HttpsSub:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasHttpsEndpoint
    Properties:
      Protocol: https
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimaryTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref HttpsEndpoint
      DeliveryPolicy: '{"backoffRate":"2.0","version":"2008-10-17","http":{"defaultHealthyRetryPolicy":{"numRetries":5,"numNoDataRetries":5,"numMaxDelayRetries":5,"numMinDelayRetries":0},"defaultRetryPolicy":{"numNoDataRetries":5,"numMaxDelayRetries":5,"numMinDelayRetries":0},"defaultErrorRetryPolicy":{"numRetries":5,"numNoDataRetries":5,"numMaxDelayRetries":5,"numMinDelayRetries":0}}}'

  SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm'
      AlarmDescription:
        Fn::Sub:
        - Alarm if NumberOfNotificationsFailed exceeds ${AlarmThreshold} on ${TopicName}
          AlarmThreshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
          TopicName: !GetAtt PrimaryTopic.TopicName
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt PrimaryTopic.TopicName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackTopic

Outputs:
  PrimaryTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the primary centralized alerting SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref PrimaryTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrimaryTopicArn'

  FallbackTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the fallback SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref FallbackTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FallbackTopicArn'

  AlarmName:
    Description: 'Name of the CloudWatch Alarm monitoring failed notifications'
    Value: !Ref SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AlarmName'

  FallbackSubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the fallback email subscription'
    Value: !Ref FallbackEmailSub
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FallbackSubscriptionArn'

  PrimaryEmailSubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the primary email subscription (if created)'
    Value:
      Fn::If:
      - HasMainEmail
      - !Ref MainEmailSub
      - AWS::NoValue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrimaryEmailSubscriptionArn'

  HttpsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the HTTPS subscription (if created)'
    Value:
      Fn::If:
      - HasHttpsEndpoint
      - !Ref HttpsSub
      - AWS::NoValue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HttpsSubscriptionArn'
deploy_logs: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS Batch Environment for Containerized Jobs with VPC, S3, and Sample Job Definition

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Prefix for S3 bucket name
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: m5.large
    Description: EC2 instance type for Batch compute environment
  JobImage:
    Type: String
    Default: amazonlinux:2
    Description: Docker image for the job definition
  MaxVCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 16
    Description: Maximum vCPUs for the compute environment
  InputObjectKey:
    Type: String
    Default: input/sample.txt
    Description: S3 input object key for the sample job
  ComputeResourceType:
    Type: String
    Default: EC2
    AllowedValues:
      - EC2
      - SPOT
    Description: Allocation type for compute resources

Conditions:
  IsSpot: !Equals
    - !Ref ComputeResourceType
    - SPOT

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select: [ 0, { Fn::GetAZs: '' } ]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchServiceRole"

  BatchInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchInstanceRole"

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref BatchInstanceRole

  BatchJobRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessForBatchJob
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BatchJobRole"

  BatchSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for AWS Batch EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-batch-sg"

  BatchLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-batch-lt"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: 'resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ecs/optimized-ami/amazon-linux-2/recommended/image_id'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        Monitoring:
          Enabled: true
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-batch-instance"

  BatchComputeEnv:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      ComputeResources:
        Type: !Ref ComputeResourceType
        InstanceRole: !GetAtt BatchInstanceRole.Arn
        LaunchTemplate:
          LaunchTemplateId: !Ref BatchLaunchTemplate
          Version: !Sub "${BatchLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber}"
        InstanceTypes:
          - !Ref InstanceType
          - m5.xlarge
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PublicSubnet
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        MinvCpus: 0
        MaxvCpus: !Ref MaxVCpus
        DesiredvCpus: 0
        BidPercentage: !If [ IsSpot, 100, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue' ]
        AllocationStrategy: BEST_FIT_PROGRESSIVE

  BatchJobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      Priority: 1
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !Ref BatchComputeEnv

  BatchJobDefinition:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      Type: container
      JobDefinitionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-demo-job-def"
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Ref JobImage
        vCpu: 2
        memory: 4096
        JobRoleArn: !GetAtt BatchJobRole.Arn
        Command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - !Sub
            - >-
              yum update -y && yum install -y aws-cli && aws s3 cp s3://${S3Bucket}/${InputObjectKey} /tmp/input.txt || echo "No input file found. Creating dummy input." > /tmp/input.txt && echo "Processing complete at $(date)" >> /tmp/input.txt && aws s3 cp /tmp/input.txt s3://${S3Bucket}/output/processed-${InputObjectKey} && aws s3 ls s3://${S3Bucket}/output/

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: ARN of the Batch Compute Environment
    Value: !GetAtt BatchComputeEnv.ComputeEnvironmentArn
  JobQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the Batch Job Queue
    Value: !GetAtt BatchJobQueue.JobQueueArn
  JobDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Batch Job Definition
    Value: !GetAtt BatchJobDefinition.JobDefinitionArn
deploy_logs: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Deploys a self-contained Apache/PHP web server environment in a new VPC. Provisions VPC, public subnet, IGW, route table,
  security group, IAM role/instance profile, and t2.micro EC2 instance. Instance uses user data to install Apache/PHP/AWS CLI,
  downloads ZIP web content from specified S3 bucket/key, deploys to /var/www/html, and signals completion via cfn-signal.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      ImageId: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      ImageId: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      ImageId: ami-0cfcbf11bd719272e
    us-west-2:
      ImageId: ami-0d3a7bc97e1fe1e6b

Parameters:
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the existing S3 bucket containing the ZIP file with web content.
  S3KeyName:
    Type: String
    Description: S3 object key (including path) to the ZIP file with web content.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing HTTP inbound and all outbound traffic.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  WebServerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess

  WebServerInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref WebServerRole

  WebServerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', ImageId]
        InstanceType: t2.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref WebServerInstanceProfile
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeType: gp2
              VolumeSize: 8
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            GroupSet:
              - !Ref WebServerSG
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WebServerLaunchTemplate"
        - ResourceType: instance
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WebServerInstance"

  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WebServerLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WebServerLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          MIME-Version: 1.0
          Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="==MYBOUNDARY=="

          --==MYBOUNDARY==
          Content-Type: text/cloud-config; charset="us-ascii"

          #cloud-config
          package_update: true
          package_upgrade: true
          packages:
            - httpd
            - php
            - awscli
            - unzip
            - aws-cfn-bootstrap
          services:
            httpd:
              enabled: true
              running: true

          --==MYBOUNDARY==
          Content-Type: text/x-shellscript; charset="us-ascii"
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          aws s3 cp s3://${S3BucketName}/${S3KeyName} /tmp/content.zip
          cd /tmp
          rm -rf /var/www/html/*
          unzip -o content.zip -d /var/www/html/
          rm -f content.zip
          chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html
          find /var/www/html -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;
          find /var/www/html -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
          systemctl restart httpd
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region}

          --==MYBOUNDARY==--
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  InstancePublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the web server instance.
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicIp

  InstancePublicDNS:
    Description: Public DNS name of the web server instance (http://<PublicDNS>).
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic Lambda function with Node.js inline code and CloudWatch Logs permissions'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaExecutionRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  MyLambdaFunction:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: MyLambdaFunction
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log(JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: event.value || "No value provided"
            };
          };
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicLambda
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref MyLambdaFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionName'

  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt MyLambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with mock /hello endpoint, HTTPS enforcement, and no caching.'

Resources:
  HelloWorldApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: HelloWorldApiCloudFront

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt HelloWorldApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: ''
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "Hello World"}'

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: HelloMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      Description: Production deployment

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: HelloWorldApiCloudFront

  LogsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting CloudFront logs bucket
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow CloudFront service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: HelloWorldApiCloudFront

  LogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'helloworld-cloudfront-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LogsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: HelloWorldApiCloudFront

  LogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${LogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                AWS:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/*'

  HelloWorldWebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApiWebACL
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: HelloWorldApiWebACL
      Rules:
        - Name: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
          Priority: 0
          Statement:
            ManagedRuleGroupStatement:
              VendorName: AWS
              Name: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
          OverrideAction:
            None: {}
          VisibilityConfig:
            SampledRequestsEnabled: true
            CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
            MetricName: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: HelloWorldApiCloudFront

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        Comment: CloudFront for HelloWorld API Gateway
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          Compress: true
          ForwardedValues:
            QueryString: false
            Cookies:
              Forward: none
            Headers: []
          MinTTL: 0
          DefaultTTL: 0
          MaxTTL: 0
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub '${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            OriginPath: /prod
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPSPort: 443
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
              OriginSSLProtocols:
                - TLSv1.2
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        WebACLId: !GetAtt HelloWorldWebACL.Arn
        Logging:
          Bucket: !GetAtt LogsBucket.DomainName
          Prefix: cloudfront-logs/
          IncludeCookies: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: HelloWorldApiCloudFront

Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the CloudFront distribution
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName

  ApiGatewayEndpoint:
    Description: Full endpoint URL for the /hello resource
    Value: !Sub '${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello'

  ProdStageArn:
    Description: ARN of the prod stage
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}::/restapis/${HelloWorldApi}/stages/prod'
