final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an IAM Developer Role with configurable permission boundaries enforcing governance controls such as naming prefixes, Owner tags, and permission boundaries.'

Parameters:
  EnableStrictBoundary:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["Yes", "No"]
    Default: "No"
    Description: "Toggle strict governance"
  TeamPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "MyTeam"
    Description: "Naming prefix for team resources"
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: "MyTeam"
    Description: "Value for mandatory Owner tag"

Conditions:
  UseStrictBoundary: !Equals [!Ref EnableStrictBoundary, "Yes"]

Resources:
  DefaultPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:GetRole
              - iam:ListRoles
              - iam:GetPolicy
              - iam:ListPolicies
              - iam:GetPolicyVersion
              - iam:ListPolicyVersions
              - iam:GetUser
              - iam:ListUsers
              - iam:GetGroup
              - iam:ListGroups
            Resource: "*"

  RestrictedDeveloperPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          # Role management with prefix, boundary, and tags
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:CreateRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "iam:ResourceName": !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
              StringEquals:
                "iam:PermissionsBoundary": !GetAtt DefaultPermissionBoundary.PolicyArn
                "aws:RequestTag/Owner": !Ref OwnerTagValue
              ForAllValues:StringEquals:
                "aws:TagKeys": ["Owner"]
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:UpdateRole
              - iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "iam:ResourceName": !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
              StringEquals:
                "iam:PermissionsBoundary": !GetAtt DefaultPermissionBoundary.PolicyArn
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:DeleteRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
          # Policy management
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:CreatePolicy
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "iam:PolicyName": !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
              StringEquals:
                "aws:RequestTag/Owner": !Ref OwnerTagValue
              ForAllValues:StringEquals:
                "aws:TagKeys": ["Owner"]
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:CreatePolicyVersion
              - iam:DeletePolicyVersion
              - iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "iam:PolicyName": !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:DeletePolicy
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
          # Attach and inline policies
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:AttachRolePolicy
              - iam:DetachRolePolicy
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:PutRolePolicy
              - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "iam:PolicyName": !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
          # Tagging
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:TagRole
              - iam:TagPolicy
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:RequestTag/Owner": !Ref OwnerTagValue
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:UntagRole
              - iam:UntagPolicy
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
            Condition:
              ForAllValues:StringEquals:
                "aws:TagKeys": ["Owner"]
          # Read-only IAM
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:GetRole
              - iam:ListRoles
              - iam:GetPolicy
              - iam:ListPolicies
              - iam:GetPolicyVersion
              - iam:ListPolicyVersions
              - iam:GetUser
              - iam:ListUsers
              - iam:GetGroup
              - iam:ListGroups
            Resource: "*"

  PermissiveDeveloperPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: "iam:*"
            Resource: "*"

  DeveloperRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeveloperRole'
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
      ManagedPolicyArns: !If [UseStrictBoundary, [!Ref RestrictedDeveloperPolicy], [!Ref PermissiveDeveloperPolicy]]
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UseStrictBoundary, !Ref DefaultPermissionBoundary, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      Tags:
        - Key: "Owner"
          Value: !Ref OwnerTagValue

Outputs:
  DeveloperRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Developer Role"
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperRole.Arn
  DefaultBoundaryArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Default Permission Boundary Policy"
    Value: !GetAtt DefaultPermissionBoundary.PolicyArn
  ActiveDeveloperPolicyArn:
    Description: "ARN of the active Developer Policy (Restricted or Permissive based on EnableStrictBoundary)"
    Value: !If [UseStrictBoundary, !GetAtt RestrictedDeveloperPolicy.PolicyArn, !GetAtt PermissiveDeveloperPolicy.PolicyArn]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a Lambda-backed custom resource for dynamic arithmetic operations with failure simulation.'

Parameters:
  FirstNumber:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
    Default: 0
    Description: 'the first operand'
  SecondNumber:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
    Default: 0
    Description: 'the second operand'
  Operator:
    Type: String
    Default: '+'
    AllowedValues:
      - '+'
      - '-'
      - '*'
      - '/'
    Description: 'the arithmetic operation'
  FailOnPurpose:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'Yes'
      - 'No'
    Default: 'No'
    Description: 'simulating custom resource failure during testing'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ArithmeticCustomResource

  ArithmeticCustomResourceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          from urllib.error import HTTPError

          class NoRedirect(urllib.request.HTTPRedirectHandler):
              def redirect_request(self, req, fp, code, msg, headers, newurl):
                  raise HTTPError(req.full_url, code, msg, headers, None)

          opener = urllib.request.build_opener(NoRedirect())

          def send_response(event, context, status, physical_resource_id, data, reason=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': status,
                  'Reason': reason or "See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream.",
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': data
              }
              json_str = json.dumps(response_body)
              json_data = json_str.encode('utf-8')
              headers = {
                  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                  'Content-Length': str(len(json_data))
              }
              request = urllib.request.Request(
                  url=response_url,
                  data=json_data,
                  method='PUT',
                  headers=headers
              )
              try:
                  opener.open(request)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Failed to send response: {e}")

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              request_type = event['RequestType']

              if request_type == 'Delete':
                  send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', event['PhysicalResourceId'], {})
                  return

              first_str = props.get('FirstNumber', '')
              op_str = props.get('Operator', '')
              second_str = props.get('SecondNumber', '')
              if first_str and op_str and second_str:
                  physical_resource_id = f"{first_str}-{op_str}-{second_str}"
              else:
                  physical_resource_id = "ArithmeticResource"

              first_num = float(props.get('FirstNumber', 0))
              second_num = float(props.get('SecondNumber', 0))
              operator = props.get('Operator', '+')
              fail_on_purpose = props.get('FailOnPurpose', 'No')

              if fail_on_purpose == 'Yes':
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', physical_resource_id, {}, "Simulated failure for testing")
                  return

              try:
                  if operator == '+':
                      result = first_num + second_num
                  elif operator == '-':
                      result = first_num - second_num
                  elif operator == '*':
                      result = first_num * second_num
                  elif operator == '/':
                      if second_num == 0:
                          raise ZeroDivisionError('Cannot divide by zero')
                      result = first_num / second_num
                  else:
                      raise ValueError(f"Unsupported operator: {operator}")

                  data = {
                      'Result': str(result),
                      'OperatorUsed': operator
                  }
                  send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', physical_resource_id, data)
                  return
              except Exception as e:
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', physical_resource_id, {}, str(e))
                  return
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ArithmeticCustomResource

  CustomArithmeticHelper:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt ArithmeticCustomResourceLambda.Arn
      FirstNumber: !Ref FirstNumber
      SecondNumber: !Ref SecondNumber
      Operator: !Ref Operator
      FailOnPurpose: !Ref FailOnPurpose

Outputs:
  CalculationResult:
    Value: !GetAtt CustomArithmeticHelper.Result
  OperatorUsed:
    Value: !GetAtt CustomArithmeticHelper.OperatorUsed
  StackStatus:
    Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName} (ID: ${AWS::StackId})"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless calculator workflow using AWS Step Functions and Lambda for arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide) with choice-based routing.

Resources:
  CalculatorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/lambda/Calculator
      RetentionInDays: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CalculatorWorkflow

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CalculatorWorkflow

  StepFunctionsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeCalculatorPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt Calculator.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CalculatorWorkflow

  Calculator:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: Calculator
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              try:
                  operator = event.get('operator')
                  operands = event.get('operands', [])
                  if not operator or len(operands) != 2:
                      raise ValueError('Invalid input: operator and two operands required')
                  a = float(operands[0])
                  b = float(operands[1])
                  if operator == 'add':
                      result = a + b
                  elif operator == 'subtract':
                      result = a - b
                  elif operator == 'multiply':
                      result = a * b
                  elif operator == 'divide':
                      if b == 0:
                          raise ValueError('Division by zero')
                      result = a / b
                  else:
                      raise ValueError('Unsupported operator')
                  return {'status': 'success', 'result': result}
              except Exception as e:
                  return {'status': 'error', 'message': str(e)}
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CalculatorWorkflow

      DefinitionSubstitutions:

      DefinitionString: |
        {
          "Comment": "A simple calculator workflow",
          "StartAt": "DetermineOperation",
          "States": {
            "DetermineOperation": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "add",
                  "Next": "PerformAdd"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "subtract",
                  "Next": "PerformSubtract"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "multiply",
                  "Next": "PerformMultiply"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "divide",
                  "Next": "PerformDivide"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "UnsupportedOperation"
            },
            "PerformAdd": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${CalculatorArn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "ResultPath": "$.result",
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "PerformSubtract": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${CalculatorArn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "ResultPath": "$.result",
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "PerformMultiply": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${CalculatorArn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "ResultPath": "$.result",
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "PerformDivide": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${CalculatorArn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "ResultPath": "$.result",
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "UnsupportedOperation": {
              "Type": "Fail",
              "Cause": "Unsupported operator",
              "Error": "InvalidInput"
            },
            "Success": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            }
          }
        }
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Level: ALL
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
              LogGroupArn: !GetAtt CalculatorLogGroup.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CalculatorWorkflow

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated image recognition pipeline using Step Functions, S3, Rekognition, and SNS for SMS alerts when human faces are detected in uploaded images.
Resources:
  ImageBucketKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for ImageBucket SSE-KMS encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
  SNSTopicKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for SNSTopic encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
  ImageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-images-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ImageBucketKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-tier AWS network environment with secure public/private subnets, NAT Gateway, route tables, and SSM-managed EC2 instances in public and private subnets.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierVPC
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure static website hosted on S3 with CloudFront CDN, Origin Access Control (OAC), custom 60s TTL cache policy, Lambda-automated content management for index.html deployment and bucket cleanup, HTTPS enforcement, and optimized caching.

Resources:
  StaticWebsiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-static-site"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256

  StaticSiteOAI:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::CloudFrontOriginAccessIdentity
    Properties:
      CloudFrontOriginAccessIdentityConfig:
        Comment: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-OAI for static site"

  Custom60sTTLPolicy:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Production-ready CloudFormation template for a highly available Jenkins server deployment across multiple AZs using Auto Scaling Group, Launch Template, VPC, and SSM integration.'

Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups: []
    ParameterLabels: {}

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      HVM64: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      HVM64: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      HVM64: ami-0d1fcd6e94f706435
    us-west-2:
      HVM64: ami-0cf93a2ba900fd3cc
    eu-west-1:
      HVM64: ami-0dd6bb8f3c0aebe10
    eu-central-1:
      HVM64: ami-0e01e4def509dbb5a
    ap-southeast-1:
      HVM64: ami-0b45d1d10a580a6c7
    ap-southeast-2:
      HVM64: ami-0a6ed1fa0159c4651
    ap-northeast-1:
      HVM64: ami-0b1f37abd8dfab6e6
    ap-northeast-2:
      HVM64: ami-0f34d35e65c1d1aa8
    ca-central-1:
      HVM64: ami-0d3a7bc95a48e1deb
    eu-west-2:
      HVM64: ami-03ed7b2d6a1a8e59d
    eu-west-3:
      HVM64: ami-0a5f3559d9f3e8e69
    eu-north-1:
      HVM64: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    sa-east-1:
      HVM64: ami-09e32f62c897a37b9
    ap-south-1:
      HVM64: ami-0d3a7bc95a48e1deb

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicNACL'

  NACLInboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundJenkins:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 8080
        To: 8080
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundEphemeralTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 400
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundEphemeralUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 500
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

  NACLEgressEphemeralTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  NACLEgressEphemeralUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  PublicSubnet1NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  PublicSubnet2NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for Jenkins EC2 instances allowing inbound Jenkins port 8080 and all outbound traffic.'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSG'

  JenkinsEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEC2Role'

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsEC2Role

  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsLaunchTemplate'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', HVM64]
        InstanceType: t3.medium
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref JenkinsInstanceProfile
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -ex
            yum update -y
            yum install -y java-11-amazon-corretto amazon-cfn-bootstrap
            curl -fsSL https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo | tee /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo > /dev/null
            yum makecache
            yum install -y jenkins
            chown -R jenkins:jenkins /var/lib/jenkins /var/cache/jenkins /var/log/jenkins
            sed -i.bak 's/^\(JENKINS_PORT\)=.*/\1="8080"/' /etc/sysconfig/jenkins
            systemctl daemon-reload
            systemctl enable jenkins
            systemctl start jenkins
            until echo > /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/8080 2>/dev/null; do
              echo "Waiting for Jenkins to listen on port 8080..."
              sleep 10
            done
            echo "Jenkins bootstrap completed successfully."
            # /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource JenkinsASG --region ${AWS::Region}

  JenkinsASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsASG'
      VPCZoneIdentifier: [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '3'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      DefaultInstanceWarmup: 300
      TerminationPolicies:
        - OldestLaunchTemplate
        - OldestInstance
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsInstance'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  ASGName:
    Description: 'Name of the Jenkins Auto Scaling Group. Use to reference instances.'
    Value: !Ref JenkinsASG
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ASGName'

  LaunchTemplateId:
    Description: 'ID of the Jenkins Launch Template.'
    Value: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LaunchTemplateId'

  PublicSubnets:
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of public subnet IDs hosting Jenkins instances.'
    Value: !Join [', ', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnets'

  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: 'Security Group ID for Jenkins instances. Jenkins accessible via public IP:8080 or SSM Session Manager.'
    Value: !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'

  VPCId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC.'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'
